subject: Re: Projet de peinture – Germain Montréal
normalizedText:
Bonjour M. Labrie,

Merci pour votre message et pour avoir pensé à nous pour ce projet. Oui,
j’allais écrire à Matthieu.

Après avoir pris le temps d’analyser le produit demandé (Scuffmaster) et
les exigences d’application, on préfère finalement ne pas soumissionner. Le
produit demande une application au spray, ce qu’on évite au tant que
possible pour être honnête — surtout dans un espace restreint et avec un
produit plus technique et plus toxique que les peintures à base d’eau qu’on
utilise d’habitude.

On préfère donc laisser passer notre tour cette fois-ci. Merci encore pour
votre considération et au plaisir d’une future collaboration dans un autre
contexte.

Bien à vous,

Loric St-Onge

Pour OstéoPeinture

subject: Re: Mise -à-jour — Projection des Coûts — Réparations / Ajouts
normalizedSubject: Mise -à-jour — Projection des Coûts — Réparations / Ajouts
normalizedText:
Bonjour Mr. Parodi,

Voici les coûts estimés pour les ajouts que vous avez demandés pour le toit
:

*1. Corniches (avant et arrière)*

- *Description : *préparation complète et peinture des corniches avant
et arrière (26 blocs / ~40 pieds linéaires par face). Cela inclut le
meulage de la rouille, l'élimination de toute peinture écaillée, le
resurfaçage, le calfeutrage si nécessaire, l'application d'un apprêt et de
peinture haut de gamme.
- *Coût estimé :* 2700 – 3000 $ par côté
- Cela exclut le travail de réajustement de l'échafaudage (dévisser les
panneaux, bouger les panneaux et madriers) pour nous permettre d’accéder à
la corniche, probablement environ 200-300$ par face, autour de 500$ en
tout.
- *Total pour les deux corniches :* 6000 - 6500$
- *Couleur à confirmer :* faire correspondance avec le gris foncé de
l’ardoise du toit ou le gris pâle du nouveau revêtement de tôle en façade ?
À valider avec votre femme une fois apprové.

*2. Peinture des lucarnes fermées sur le toit*

- *Description :* Préparation, grattage, apprêt et peinture des lucarnes
- Couleur à faire correspondre au gris pale du nouveau fascia en tôle du
toit.
- *Coût estimé :* environ 550 $ par lucarne
- *Total :* 1 000 – 1 200 $

Le coût total estimé pour ces ajouts se situe donc entre 7500$ - 8000$.

Merci de me confirmer si ces ajouts conviennent. Je reste disponible pour
toute question!

Tenez moi au courant pour les développements avec Peter lorsque une
décision sera prise!

Cordialement,

Loric

Loric

subject: Mise -à-jour — Projection des Coûts — Réparations / Ajouts
normalizedSubject: Mise -à-jour — Projection des Coûts — Réparations / Ajouts
normalizedText:
Bonjour Mr. Parodi,

Je vous partage ici une liste des différentes sections des réparations que
nous prévoyons entreprendre pour vous donner une vue d’ensemble des coûts
approximatifs prévus et vous permettre de décider maintenant ce que vous
aimeriez ajouter ou possiblement reporter à une date ultérieure.

Ce plan exclut les réparations plus profonde probablement nécessaires sur
3-4 fenêtres. (Je n’ai toujours pas réussi à rejoindre votre menuisier.
Peut être il est en vacances? Peut être il faudrait prévoir un plan B? Je
re-essaierai demain mais vous aurez probablement plus de succès que moi à
le rejoindre.

Notez que bien que réalistes, ces projections demeurent des estimations.

Lambris façades extérieures

Réparation des planches de lambris extérieures endommagées ou pourries.

-

Matériaux : 140 $
-

Main-d’œuvre : 360–500 $
-

Total estimé : 500–650 $

------------------------------

Véranda

Remplacer les planches de lambris pourries (nécessaires) et ajuster là où
nécessaire pour uniformiser et éliminer tous les joints visibles.

-

Matériaux : 250 $
-

Main-d’œuvre : 1000–1500 $
-

Total estimé : 1250–1750 $

------------------------------

Soffite du balcon

Remplacer les planches actuelles par des planches complètes afin d’éliminer
les joints apparents.

-

Matériaux : 210 $
-

Main-d’œuvre : 360–600 $
-

Total estimé : 550–800 $

------------------------------

Gorges

Remplacer toutes les vieilles gorges par des longueurs complètes en pin.

-

Matériaux : 250 $
-

Main-d’œuvre : 300–360 $
-

Total estimé : 550–600 $

------------------------------

Moulures

Ajout de moulures pour masquer les joints horizontaux visibles dans le
lambris.

-

Matériaux : 300 $
-

Main-d’œuvre : 240–300 $
-

Total estimé : 550–600 $

------------------------------

Seuils – Véranda (2×12)

Ajuster la structure sous-jacente et remplacer les seuils par des planches
complètes pour éviter l’infiltration d’eau.

-

Matériaux : 100 $
-

Main-d’œuvre : 360–540 $
-

Total estimé : 450–650 $

------------------------------

Seuils – Fenêtres (2×6 ou 5/4x6)

Remplacer les seuils par des planches plus épaisses et plus larges en
assurant un léger dépassement de la façade.

-

Matériaux : 153 $
-

Main-d’œuvre : 360–540 $
-

Total estimé : 500–700 $

------------------------------

Autres réparations

Travaux ponctuels pour remplacer diverses planches ou pièces de bois
manquantes, pourries ou brisées sur l’ensemble des façades (exclut
réparations en profondeur).

-

Matériaux : 125 $
-

Main-d’œuvre : 250–300 $
-

Total estimé : 375–425 $

------------------------------

Les sections des Moulures, Gorges et Véranda et Soffite du balcon sont
principalement esthétiques, mais chacunes importantes à mon avis.

Je vous envoie des photos par texto pour vous permettre de mieux visualiser
le tout.

N’hésitez pas si vous avez des questions. Je suis disponible.

Merci,

Loric

Bonjour Mr. Parodi,

J'espère que vous allez bien.
Je vous joint la seconde soumission formelle à nous retourner signée svp.

Également, serait-il possible de nous faire un virement pour les travaux
effectuer jusqu’à présent?

Nous avons mis environ 60H jusqu’à présent pour toutes réparations
confondues — principalement la démolition de tout le bois qui était
endommagé, des panneaux à remplacer, ainsi qu’autour de la porte de garage;
le réajustement de la structure sous les seuils de fenêtre; la
réinstallation de certaine planche de lambris sur la façade avec apprêt à
l’huile sur les nouvelles planches, etc.

Il reste encore beaucoup de travail à faire, je vous tiens au courant.

Entre-temps, un virement serait apprécié pour couvrir les réparations à ce
jour (3900$), le reste du travail entamé à ce jour (4000$) + la location
des échafaudages. Bref on serait environ à 8500$ mais vous avez déjà viré
3500$ donc un 5000$ serait bon pour couvrir jusqu'à présent.

Laissez-moi savoir ce qui est possible de votre côté.

Merci,

Loric

normalizedSubject: Exterior Painting Quote — 570 Grosvenor Ave. — Summer 2025
normalizedText:
Hi Susan,

Thanks for your message and questions.

Regarding the Sherwin Williams paint, we typically use their high-end
Duration exterior line with a satin or low-sheen finish, but finish choice
is entirely yours! What finish would you prefer?

Understood on the two different paint colors for the front and side. We'll
make sure to match both accordingly. We can use the color swatches you had.
And thank you for mentioning the caulking tubes from your window
installers; we'll definitely use those for the three side windows.

For the frosted glass, yes, we can certainly help with a template for the
two right windows (excluding the stained glass one). We’ll cut the shape
out in some material so you can bring it to the window shop. For this
frosted window project, we’d simply charge you separately based on the time
it takes us for the window reinstall — we’ll have a better sense of price
once we get close up and remove the frame mouldings.

And yes, to confirm, our price includes primer where needed and two
complete coats of paint.

Finally, yes, we are certainly insured.

Let me know if you have any other questions. I will call you Monday around
10:30-11am. Feel free to call me today as well, if you prefer.

Best,

Loric

normalizedSubject: Exterior Painting Quote - 4 Summit Circle — Summer 2025
normalizedText:
Good evening Mme Coopersmith,

As promised, please find attached our detailed quote for the exterior
painting of your home on Summit Circle.

The prices reflect realistic estimates based on our on-site evaluation and
past experience. We've accounted for thorough preparation work, though—as
discussed—the full extent will only become clear once we begin, especially
for elements such as the cornices and dormers. We’ll keep you updated
throughout and adjust the final price accordingly, whether upward or
downward.

You'll notice the quote lists the *right side of the house *— i.e. the two
inclined cornices and two wooden windows — as an *optional extra*. This
portion involves significant access challenges: a lift cannot reach it, and
a more complex scaffolding setup is required. We’ve therefore left it as an
add-on to give you the flexibility to decide based on your budget.

Please let us know once you've had a chance to review everything. We’ll be
happy to discuss how it fits with your priorities and, if you're ready,
find a window to begin the work in the coming weeks — ideally before fall.

Feel free to reach out with any questions or if anything needs
clarification.

Looking forward to hearing from you,

Graeme

Hi Mark,

Hope you're doing well.
Thank you for your patience.

Please find attached the painting quote for your exterior project.
As we discussed, I've excluded the 6 windows you mentioned.

I just want to reiterate that these costs are not fixed quotes, but rather
realistic estimated budgets, taking into consideration all the preparation
that seems to be required based on our experience. We work this way for
exterior work and especially high-reach areas which are difficult to
estimate. In other words, it happens that the final price shifts a bit —
sometimes lower, sometimes higher — depending on the prep work needed once
we get started. We'll definitely keep you in the loop as soon as we have a
clearer picture, especially if wood repairs are required.

For the side triangle, I included the cost of the lift rental for one day
as the work up there might be doable in one day, provided we don't need to
replace any wood up there. I listed the extra cost for an extra day, so you
are aware.

Voilà.

subject: Painting Quote — Exterior Home Refresh 2025
normalizedText:
Good evening sir,

I hope all is well, and thank you for your patience.
Please find attached the painting quote for your exterior project.

For transparency, I would like to underline that these costs are not fixed
quotes but rather realistic budget estimates, taking into account the
preparation we anticipate based on our experience. For exterior work,
repairs, and especially high-reach areas, it is difficult to provide an
exact figure at the outset. We always keep are clients updated as soon as
we have a clearer picture of the scope of work, particularly regarding wood
repairs.

For the back façade, the slope of the driveway may be too steep for the
usual boom lifts to operate safely. To be certain, I have included the
price of a self-levelling *spider lift*. That said, we plan to return to
measure the slope directly: if it turns out that a standard lift will work,
this could save you approximately *$1,000* in rental costs.

If the rest of the quote seems reasonable and you would like to proceed, we
will gladly come by to confirm the measurement and ensure you receive the
best possible price for the lift.

Please let me know how this proposal aligns with your budget. If needed, we
can always split the work and leave a portion for next summer. At the
moment, we are looking to begin toward the end of September.

Lastly, if ever you would like some references of our past clients in
Westmount, let me know, I'll be happy to provide some.

As always, don’t hesitate to reach out with any questions or for further
clarification.

Best regards,

*Loric St-Onge *

*Entrepreneur peintre*

system that would to run my painting contractor business. I have been using
my current Google spreadsheet that I set up myself for the past 4 years to
run but it’s become way to time consuming to everything things manually. I
need to streamline my setup.

subject: Re: Business Finances Fresh SetUp
normalizedText:
Thank you for your prompt response — hope you're enjoying the travels.

Sounds Good.

Just to clarify is Sept 4th the soonest we could begin the work?
I'm asking because I am looking to set up things asap on my end.

If that's the case, perhaps there's some groundwork I can do ahead of time.
Currently, I've set up the Account, connected the banks, set up the
Categories, begun and will begin auto-cat.

Where I'm a little stuck now is finding the right templates to make this
work for a business: P&L, Cashflow, accounts tracker, cash account,
dividends ledger, P&L per job/contract, and Wages Payment tracker... this
is what I need. I looked briefly at a template, (Simple Business Dashboard,
etc) but I feel choosing the right ones is critical at this point and I
don't have the time to figure it all out on my own with trial and error —
hence why I'm reaching out.

Also, I am little concerned the system might bug if it's all "custom" made
using Tiller. I really don't have space to spend debugging spreadsheets or
spending time on forums anymore, yet I feel I need the customization
possibility.

Ideal scenario for me is that we take the time to set it up well and then
it works for the next few years, smoothly.
Perhaps with punctual shorter consultations if the need ever arises.
I also see myself using this custom system for other businesses I manage,
and maybe a simpler version for my personal finances.

That's where I am at, in brief.
To sum up, I'm willing to pay for something reliable and peace of mind,
while preserving a certain flexibility and privacy that softwares like
Quickbooks dont have.
I hope this helps you understand my needs.
Please let me know if this is something you can help with.

Thank you for your time,

Loric

subject: 3892 Ave Laval — Soumission Peinture & Plâtrage
normalizedText:
Bonjour à vous deux,

Je reviens vers vous parce qu’il semble qu’il nous soit possible de
retarder notre autre contrat d’une semaine. On aurait donc 2 semaines,
voire plus, pour faire les réparations et la peinture, si on commence en ce
début de semaine.

On devrait avoir le temps de tout terminer, à voir selon le niveau de
re-surfaçage et de finition que vous exigerez.

Il nous faut d’abord discuter de tout ça !

Voici un estimé approximatif pour vous donner un sens de prix :

*Protection : ~1300-1500$ *Protection hermétique des planchers et meubles,
barrières anti-poussières

*Réparations : ~3500-4500$+*

- Fermer les réparations déjà ouverte par votre entrepreneur général:
~2000-2500$
- Réparations des craques non-ouvertes, notamment plafond s-a-d et murs
petite chambre — 1200$-1800$
- Matériaux pour réparations: 200-300$
- Re-surfaçage léger de certaines corniches — à revoir de plus près —
généralement environ 50$ / pi linéaire

*Re-surfaçage des moulures : ~1500$*Re-surfaçage des plinthes, cadres de
portes et fenêtres — à déterminer selon le niveau de détails désiré, disons
~1500$

- Amélioration de 50%, demanderait environ 4H par pièce ~1300-1500$
- Amélioration de 80% demanderait environ 6-8H dans chaque pièce
~2100-2500$

*Primer + peinture — 6500-7000$*

- Plafond, murs, moulures: ~4500$
- Calorifère (7) ~1250-1500$
- Matériaux peinture et apprêt: ~1000-1200$ (peinture murs : SW
SuperPaint)

*****

Voilà qui devrait vous donner une idée. Si vous êtes intéressés à faire
affaire avec nous, on est ouvert à discuter! Je pourrai vous envoyer une
soumission plus formelle, mais je voulais d'abord voir avec vous pour
l'échéancier et le budget approx, à savoir si c'est une proposition que
vous seriez prêt à considérer.

Laissez-moi savoir comment vous recevez ceci et on peut s’en parler par
téléphone aujourd'hui.

Au plaisir !

*Loric St-Onge *

*Entrepreneur peintre*

514-266-2028

#201-80 St-Viateur E., Montréal, QC, H2T 1A6
*www.osteopeinture.com <http://www.osteopeinture.com/>*

subject: Ballpark Painting Quote — 311 Metcalfe Ave
normalizedText:
Hi Bianca,

Please find attached the ballpark estimate we prepared for the interior
painting work of your new home.

This estimate is based on a full interior repaint. We’ve listed price
ranges by space, based on the photos provided and our experience with
similar homes. The range is intentionally broad, as some areas are only
partially visible, and the exact scope, surface conditions, and level of
preparation required cannot be confirmed at this stage.

Certain spaces and elements (e.g. laundry room, some windows, detailed
staircase trim) are excluded for now and listed as optional add-ons. The
scope currently includes only the rooms shown in the photos, specified in
the quote.

If ever your intention is more of a light refresh [1 coat only] rather than
a full repaint, that is absolutely possible and would reduce the overall
cost.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out with any questions. We’ll be happy to
visit and provide a more precise quote once you have access to the
property. References from past clients in the neighbourhood are also
available upon request.

Looking forward to discussing the project further!

Notre Studio des Laurentides - Votre partenaire de choix pour attirer des clients qualifiés

BONJOUR

Je suis David de Guerrilla Studio.

Je vous contacte aujourd’hui pour discuter de comment nos services de production vidéo pourrait aider votre entreprise à grandir.
J'ai remarqué que la plupart des entreprises ont du mal à capter l'attention de leurs futurs clients sur le web.

[https://email.email.guerrillastudio.ca/c/eJx0k09zsjoUhz8N7OpACBAWWWhvsa2-Veu_1g0TyCGmBoJJ0NpPf0fbuXMXfbcnJye_efKcqpCc1jETT_JpuHufXqTGO_Q5e_Q5BU7SOPW5bphsKTRMqoHowRipFLOu51IPKvZzXuhzC8buZVe4SwdU6Yo5qb_r3AcapnEcIBylkX8bVTRgLRNwDcD6l-w-OM3lh5mIJ4IuG7L46boNq1jTMSna_9Wu1xKSlYQAKxkiZUAYjlCNMSM-tCdpdNtA62hnNO-raxR_T7MkIIAqTEiQJFnK6zTEYVlXZRCUJdTgS4oCFAckRCHBSRgNalSHEHNCcJ0FUcI8HPyVhKJ75zrrRUMP5R7KrdOGCRgIrYUC1kk7qHTjobyxwrbceCgnMt2ELYtWmwdAzZvYX77m1wbgknkoT5IsS0oeRVGNeBbWqM5CkqYw6Frhq6r45iFbB6Zliq5Rbvl4c3gLPTT6lI_cfCI1esyf6_TYPU-ZeGjWD7vtNdvFuLMYJ_NKsU385aGRGDKs1h4arT2UT8_ydbL4OK1i_udjzi-H6WQZbsN1_vW6HT8uPDRawGW2rF_S1fp-Z_Fmtv3zPnxW_5SLGvrXybIRmNxPhYfy41DY8fHswvpgydvC8vm7fFmKvTKrMp9dX8YZjGQ2Xp9mZywQaqLJ83ZytGcPjfa-0jdFf-PkN-D2mlPWSV8bKWRLy14d7m5Q_M7ok-RgqALGK922UDltfEO1daA7kK3rDXg4ELfvrHTjW92bCr5Nv5P2dHfW5gDGd1ebi18jOFrppvh1gRwFV_xn7omifwMAAP__RPkpWA]

C'est pourquoi je vous contacte aujourd'hui. Je suis convaincu que la vidéo corporative et le marketing de contenu peuvent être de
puissants leviers pour votre croissance et votre visibilité.💪

Imaginez les avantages pour votre entreprise:

🎥 Visibilité accrue et renforcement de l'image de marque: Des vidéos de haute qualité pour les médias sociaux, courtes et
dynamiques, captent l'attention et attirent une nouvelle clientèle.

📈 Génération de leads et tunnels de ventes: Je peux vous aider à concevoir un système qui utilise la vidéo pour attirer des
clients potentiels et les guider de la découverte à la conversion.

👷🏻‍♂️ Recrutement facilité: Présenter votre équipe, vos chantiers et l'ambiance de travail en vidéo est un excellent moyen
d'attirer des employés qualifiés.

📢 Crédibilité et confiance: Des témoignages de clients satisfaits en vidéo sont beaucoup plus convaincants que de simples textes.

🧠 Formation et sécurité: Créer du contenu vidéo pour former vos employés, notamment sur les bonnes pratiques de sécurité, est un
investissement intelligent.

subject: PSST: Get a text alert when your boss or clients email you 🤓
normalizedSubject: PSST: Get a text alert when your boss or clients email you 🤓
normalizedText:
96

Never miss a time sensitive email again💡 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

Receive Mobile Text Alerts for Important Emails

Hi there,

The average person in the United States receives 100 emails per day. That's a lot of emails to sift through in order to get to the important ones.

That's why we created Mobile Text Alerts for Gmail , a sure fire way to notify you via mobile text when you receive important emails from your:

Boss

Customers

Lawyer

Spouse or your child's teachers or principal

Or any email that has a specific keyword in it

Take a look at how easy it is to use so that you never miss an important, or time sensitive email ever again:

Get Gmail Text Alerts

Set Gmail Text Alerts

For more ideas about how to use mobile text alerts, visit this article to give you all the pointers you need.

Stay productive,

The cloudHQ team

subject: NEW! 📆🕰 Change your email display time in Gmail
normalizedSubject: NEW! 📆🕰 Change your email display time in Gmail
normalizedText:
96

Customize Gmail Display‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

🕰🗓 How to Customize Your Date and Timestamp Display in Gmail

Hi there,

Gmail shows the date and time of an email in the last column of your inbox. Depending on how old the email is, the display date format changes, which can cause confusion and oversights.

That's why we created Display Email Time by cloudHQ , a new and free extension that shows you *the exact* date and time of your emails–no more confusing information like: showing only time, showing only date, etc.

Get Display Email Time

Display Email Time by cloudHQ lets you customize:

✔️ Date and time formats

✔️ Font styles, like bold or italics

✔️ Font sizes

✔️ Custom font colors

✔️ Custom font background colors

Start making Gmail work for you today, instead of you having to work within Gmail's limitations

Stay productive,
The cloudHQ team

PS- To read more, visit our helpful blog for easy, step-by-step instructions.

Hi there,

Summer is coming to a close and it's time to get back to school. (Yes, already!)

We know that getting everything ready can be stressful, so we've created a list of top Back-to-School Apps to make your return smooth and simple.

Top Educational Apps

1. Convert PDF to Word

✅ Supports batch processing for multiple PDFs all at once!

✅ Choose from themed templates like back-to-school, a holiday signature, or add time sensitive notes such as: "Finals in 2 weeks!" ✅ Include contact info, logos, images, and school social icons with ease ✅ Have signatures automatically added to every email you send

Everything is designed to look polished without requiring any design skills. Great for teachers, staff, and administrators alike!

✅ Polls and surveys have open-ended feedback

You can install all, or only 1 of these apps. Just click on this link , and access our education apps for getting back to school with ease!

subject: NEW: Online Polls and Surveys Embedded Directly in Your Email
normalizedSubject: NEW: Online Polls and Surveys Embedded Directly in Your Email
normalizedText:
96

NEW: Online Polls and Surveys Embedded Directly in Your Email

Hi there,

Finding new clients is the hardest thing to do when growing a business, and repeat business is never a given.

When we're busy wearing so many different hats, our clients can have negative experiences, and we might never fully understand why they leave—unless we're more intentional about giving them an easy way to voice their concerns.

That's why we created Gmail Free Online Polls and Surveys by cloudHQ , a simple (and free) way for you to proactively check in with your customers.

Install Free Online Polls & Surveys

Customers can experience all kinds of negative interactions like:

Product/service malfunctions

Unmet customer expectations

Rude customer service

Something software related that prevents them from purchasing whatever's in their shopping cart

The list of possible reasons why customers move on can be a long one, but what's sure is that without being able to address the issue head on, you can count on losing their business.

Gmail Free Online Polls & Surveys by cloudHQ serves to check in with your clients during multiple touchpoints. Having an outreach plan is important, and we're outlining best practices for you below.

The Basic 5 Drip Email Campaign: An Outreach Guide
When reaching out to your prospects via email, there's a common term called "The Basic Drip 5." It's a guideline that a lot of marketers use to interact with prospects or clients over email. Let's look through them, and see where Free Online Polls & Surveys can help you out.

Email 1: Client signs up for a product, service, or requests more information.
You've created an ad, or you've offered something online, and people are coming into your sales funnel and signing up for more information. Right after a sign up, it's a great time to check in with your prospect. Usually you'll send them a welcome email, but they're just getting their feet wet and might need a little hand holding. A poll at the end of your welcome email might ask about:
Use cases . What are your customers/prospects wanting to accomplish? What do they think your product or service can help them with?

You might just be surprised at how your product / service can be used; which can give you valuable insight to help you market to new verticals or improve something about what you offer.
Personal story : With over 70 free Chrome extensions , we can't begin to tell you how often our clients want to accomplish something using one of our tools that give us a whole new way to think about how to market it. It's truly a magical moment when that happens.

Onboarding Process . How do they find the onboarding process? Is there something that they want to add, or did they get stuck somewhere?

Email 2: Product / service satisfaction .
If customers sign up for a trial, or get to use your product / service straight away, wait a few days, and then send them a "check in" email. Your goal is to make sure that they find value in your product / service, and to find out if they need any help getting set up. Most automated services are difficult at some point for a client to perform an action that you want them to take.

There could be confusion with your design flow (aka UX)

A competitor could be reaching out to them and they could feel overwhelmed so they do nothing at all (this is an ideal time for you to contact them)

They might not understand what to do

Maybe they have no need

In your email, always ask if they're enjoying your product / service. Your poll could be a simple rating scale from 1-5, and always leave an area for open-ended responses so that they can leave you more feedback if they want to. That feedback is always worth its weight in gold because customers will give you a different point of view or explain their problem—giving you the opportunity to fix it. You can use my super quick example I made below, or get creative and make it more elaborate:

Email 3: Upsell email .

These are magic words for any entrepreneur: Upsell email .
It even sounds good. But if you think you'll ever get an upsell without your customers being happy with a trial or a consultation, you're dead wrong (though, we're sure you already knew that).

That's what makes these touchpoint check-ins so important—when customers constantly give you positive feedback, you're actually playing a little bit of a psychological trick on them: you're making them confirm that they're happy with your service. When you get them into the habit of voicing it, they're more likely to:

Refer a friend

Buy something

Review you on a platform like Yelp or Google

Now, this is the important part: DO NOT send a poll or a survey in your 3rd email. Whatever your ask is, you want it to be clean by only asking for one thing: a referral, an upsell, a review, or anything else that you might need. Don't confuse anyone with multiple questions. If you do that, you'll lose out on all your work because people easily get overwhelmed and then they freeze up. Keep it clean with only one clear ask, and reap the benefits.

Email 4: Last Chance .

Sometimes emails don't get received—sometimes they get sent to spam or the promotions folder, and sometimes people just don't see it even when it's in their inbox. And even if emails are received, sometimes people don't have the time to read it all, let alone respond. That's why it's always a great idea to send an update email with a last chance offer. Again, no poll on this one either. Keep your ask very clean.

Email 5: Mailing list removal / service downgrade .

There are different schools of thought on this email. Some companies never have a goodbye email, which is considered a negative reinforcement email. But most data actually indicates that there needs to be a repercussion if the prospect or client hasn't responded to you by your 5th email. It's a little bit like behavioral training: you need both positive and negative reinforcement to demonstrate why it's good for prospects or customers to do something.

For example : If you're on the cloudHQ mailing list, our form of positive reinforcement is that you'll likely get a bunch of cool email productivity freebies every other week or so. Negative reinforcement might be when your free trial of a premium product is nearing its end and you'll be downgraded back to the freemium service. Emails in both of these cases explains how you guide your clients towards your end goal which is usually about more users, or more revenue.

Once you decide on your preferred reinforcement, you should always include a poll or survey. If you can find out at what point you went wrong, you can prevent it from happening to other prospects or clients, saving you so much time and money in the future.

The Basic Drip 5
Now that you understand how to use "The Basic Drip 5," you'll also see where you can use a poll to continue checking in with your customers and ensuring their satisfaction with your offer. The goal is very simple, but hard to achieve without constant check-ins.

In order to keep growing your business, we advise you to stay proactively precautious, and on that note, you can install Gmail Free Online Polls & Surveys by cloudHQ here:

Install Free Online Polls & Surveys

Have a very productive rest of your day,

Naomi and the cloudHQ team

subject: Offre de service
normalizedText: Email from Gestion Union   ﻿Gestion Union On n'a pas inventé la roue, on l'a optimisée! ﻿Entrepreneurs spécialisés ? Nous avons vos généraux! Entrepreneurs généraux ? Nous avons vos spécialisés! Bonjour, L'envoi de courriels est une pratique bien établie. Toutefois, l'enjeu demeure : atteindre les bons contacts, en nombre suffisant, pour générer un réel impact. C'est précisément ce que nous offrons aux entreprises de la construction du Québec : une base de données complète et ciblée regroupant entrepreneurs généraux, développeurs, constructeurs, rénovateurs, entrepreneurs spécialisés et autres acteurs clés du secteur. We hope you find value in this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and we want to take a moment to
ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from
future emails.

Why You’re Receiving This Email

You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve
previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your
information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us.

If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free
from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages.

Your Privacy is Important

We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold,
or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us
directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have.

You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs
clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction.

How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences

We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there are no hard feelings. You
can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below.

By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as
receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward,
and any changes will take effect promptly.

We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if
they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways.

Accessibility and Communication

If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email,
you can reach out directly by replying to this email. We aim to respond within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns
effectively.

Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any
feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share.

A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails

We aim to create a nonintrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages and
work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide
updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know.

Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can improve and refine
our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee that every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to review
and consider your input carefully.

Legal Information

We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and
maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every
email you receive meets these requirements.

If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and
accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed.

A Final Note

Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way
you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel,
we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you.

We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and
we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you.

This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication
preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

subject: Avant d’archiver nos coordonnées… 10 minutes qui pourraient vous éviter une perte
normalizedSubject: Avant d’archiver nos coordonnées… 10 minutes qui pourraient vous éviter une perte
normalizedText:
Beaucoup d’entreprises nous écrivent « Merci, je garde vos coordonnées ».

Bonne idée — mais le meilleur réflexe, c’est un mini-diagnostic gratuit de 5–10 minutes : on vérifie rapidement si vos pratiques
actuelles (dénonciation, facturation au bon propriétaire, clauses, suivi des recevables) vous exposent à un non-paiement.

On accompagne des centaines d’entreprises de construction depuis 20 ans; même si vous ne vous inscrivez pas, vous repartez avec
2–3 améliorations concrètes.

Appelez au 450-477-5330 x.503 pour fixer un court appel.

Claudine Faucher, Directrice générale

cfaucher@acces-credit.ca [cfaucher@acces-credit.ca]

P.S. Je vous enverrai occasionnellement des courriels contenant des conseils, des vidéos et des ressources gratuites
supplémentaires… Mais si vous n’êtes pas intéressé, n’hésitez pas à cliquer sur le bouton ci-dessous pour vous désabonner à tout
moment.

subject: Auto BCC for Teams
normalizedText:
96

Email records kept automatically ✅ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

Hi there,

Managing a team means staying on top of communication. But when emails are flying back and forth all day, it becomes easy to lose track. That can lead to missed follow-ups, compliance issues, or worse: lost revenue. :(

Auto BCC for Teams makes sure that never happens. It automatically BCCs you or your CRM address on every email sent from your team’s Gmail accounts.

How it Helps:

Automatically keeps a copy of all outgoing emails

BCCs a supervisor, manager, or CRM for complete visibility

Works silently in the background without disrupting your team

Installs remotely across employee accounts from one central dashboard

Popular Use Cases:

Sales teams :
Keep CRM records complete without relying on reps to remember

Support teams :
Ensure service emails are tracked for quality assurance

Legal and compliance :
Maintain full documentation of client interactions

Small business owners :
Get a complete picture of what is being said to customers

Get started now and take control of your email visibility without micromanaging your team.

Your friends,

The cloudHQ team.

subject: Happy Holidays from Tiller 🎁
normalizedText:
[Image "happy-holidays-from-Tiller.jpg?expires=1782967788&signature=b0bd717bdcad54f542716af09f7c9050e28ab18a884cf529d8e05f3475c73cd7&req=dSguH8h2modfUfMW2XS%2FiUAMSgiUQIn1shmzyrGf4gkb%2FN6RT3w%3D%0A"]
Hi OstéoPeinture,
Happy holidays from all of us at Tiller.
As the year comes to a close, we wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Money touches so many parts of our lives, and we’re grateful that you trust Tiller to help you bring a little more clarity, confidence, and calm to your life. We hope this season gives you space to rest, reflect, and enjoy time with the people who matter most to you.
New: Manage money together in Tiller Managing money is rarely a solo activity, and we’re excited to introduce a new feature that reflects that reality. We have now enabled you to give secondary access to Tiller to a partner, spouse, or family member to help fill your Tiller sheet, run AutoCat, and work with your data using their own login.
Whether you manage money jointly or just want another set of eyes on your numbers, this makes collaboration feel more natural and less complicated. Learn more about adding a secondary user to Tiller.
Missed our recent webinar? You can watch it anytime Earlier this month, we hosted a live webinar on getting ready for 2026 and building strong financial foundations with Tiller. If you weren’t able to attend or want to revisit the conversation, the full-length recording is now available on YouTube.
Thank you for being part of the Tiller community. We’re looking forward to supporting you in the year ahead.
Warmly, The Tiller Team

subject: Your festive email glow-up ✨🎄
normalizedText:
96

Email signatures that shine bright! 🌟 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

With the free Email Signature Generator , your email signature clearly shows who you are, your role, and how to reach you. It also gives you space to share holiday messages, important updates, and useful links on every email you send from Gmail.

Take a quick look:

5 Holiday Email Signature Examples

Creating a holiday email signature takes only a few minutes. It looks professional to everyone you email and adds a warm, seasonal touch to every message you send.

1. Christmas and New Year's Wishes

Use a classic Christmas banner to share a friendly greeting, along with any notes about office hours or closures for the holidays.

2. Happy Holidays and New Year's Wishes

Choose a Happy Holidays banner for a simple, inclusive message that still feels festive and polished.

3. Happy Winter Break Wishes

Add a winter break banner to keep families informed about school dates while sharing a cheerful seasonal message.

4. Promote a Holiday Event

Use your signature to highlight a fundraiser, gala, show, or special holiday event, with a clear call to action to reserve tickets or learn more.

5. Holiday Giveaway or Promotion

Feature a holiday giveaway or seasonal promotion in your banner so every email gently reminds people to take part.

How to Create an Effective Email Signature

1. Install Email SIgnature Generator from the Chrome extension.

It's important to note that this will only work on Google Workspace or Gmail accounts.

2. Open Gmail and click the cloudHQ icon. Select Email Signature to open the dashboard.

3. Add your details.

Fill in your name, role, company, photo, and contact information so people always know who they are hearing from and h ow to reach you.

4. Add your social links.

Choose which platforms you want to show so people can connect with you in more than one way.

5. Choose a holiday banner or upload your own.

Preview your signature live as you customize it until everything looks just right.

Final Result

Your holiday email signature is now automatically added to every email you send.

Optional Extras

You can also turn on extra options in your email signature using the Extensions panel, for example:

Add a short legal disclaimer at the bottom of every email

Include a Book me link so people can schedule a meeting with you

Show a Subscribe to my newsletter button

Feature a custom banner or sales event promotion

Highlight an MLS listing or your main website

Add a video thumbnail or a quick poll to collect feedback

All of these are simple on and off switches, so you can quickly add the options that help you get more replies, bookings, and sales without changing how you normally send email.

Create Your Holiday Email Signature today. It's free and easy to set up, and even has admin email signatures for teams!

Wishing you a wonderful holiday season,

The cloudHQ team

subject: Happy New Year from Tiller! 💥 🤩
normalizedText:
[Image "Happy+New+Year+%281%29.png?expires=1782967788&signature=6ab2c2fd6e5bd0ea0c2cbbc3b8dda8f3216625b0a50d9448d3e6f92c96bf59d5&req=dSkmFsp6lYldW%2FMW2XS%2FidiBNoyOONb5FhH3kDcxTi%2F3kUwUf4M%3D%0A"]
Hi OstéoPeinture,
Happy New Year from all of us at Tiller.
A fresh year is the perfect moment to get intentional about your money, not with pressure, but with purpose. At Tiller, we believe financial well-being isn’t about perfection; it’s about building clarity, confidence, and lasting habits that help you live the life you want.
If you’re ready to make progress toward financial peace, start with Tiller's Five Steps to Financial Well-Being—from understanding your money and building your safety net to managing debt, saving for the future, and spending with purpose. These steps provide a simple, practical roadmap no matter where you’re starting from.
Here’s to a year of intentional money decisions, clearer insights, and financial habits that make a difference. Let’s make 2026 your most financially confident year yet.
See Tiller's Five Steps to Financial Well Being Here.
In case you missed it: Earlier this month, we hosted a live webinar on getting ready for 2026 and building strong financial foundations with Tiller. If you weren’t able to attend or want to revisit the conversation, the full-length recording is available on YouTube.
Thank you for being part of the Tiller community. We’re looking forward to supporting you in the year ahead.
Warmly, The Tiller Team

subject: Centralize Company Emails and Attachments
normalizedText:
96

For Google Workspace Admins 👨‍💻 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

Hi there,

Managing email attachments across dozens or even hundreds of Gmail accounts is time consuming, especially when you need to find critical files.

That’s why we built Export Emails to Sheets for Google Workspace Admins .

With just a few clicks, you can:

• Export emails from multiple Gmail accounts into one organized spreadsheet.
• Automatically save attachments like quotes, invoices, and proposals into a Shared Google Drive folder.
• Keep every email and its attachments searchable, centralized, and secure.

Whether it’s legal documents, shipping paperwork, or ongoing project files, you’ll always know where to find them without having to dig through inboxes.

Take a look:

How To Set Up:

How to set it up:

1. Go to cloudhq.net/sheets_wizard

2. Choose Admin: Export or backup emails from multiple Gmail accounts in my domain

3. Select users

4. Select the email export to a new spreadsheet or an existing one.

5. Select the the date range, and click Start.

What You'll Get:

You’ll get a spreadsheet with tabs for each teammate and links to every email, attachment all stored in Google Drive.

Everything stays backed up, categorized, and easy to access.

Let us know if you need help getting started.

Best,
The cloudHQ Team

subject: Tomorrow: Tiller Webinar — Creating & Optimizing Categories ✅
normalizedSubject: Tomorrow: Tiller Webinar — Creating & Optimizing Categories ✅
normalizedText:
[Image "Financial+Well+Being+with+iller.png?expires=1782967788&signature=b3e880375e30e105fce2c4d0e4d3e577bde94c681d3911b1c7ae2c9e3564cc7d&req=dSkjEM98mYRaUPMW2XS%2FiT%2FlQ4pZouATnBV8aX7QHUSmM3skQms%3D%0A"]
Hi OstéoPeinture,
We hope 2026 is off to a great start for you.
If you’re still tapping into the new year for motivation to move toward financial well being, we are here to help.
A couple weeks ago we kicked off a weekly new year webinar series designed to help you get the most out of Tiller, build momentum toward financial clarity, and ask questions along the way. Webinars happen every Friday at 9AM PT / 12PM ET, and if you can’t join live, sign up anyway—we’ll send you the replay and the full Q&A.
Tomorrow’s session (Fri 1/16): Creating & Optimizing Categories
You can also catch up on the first two sessions:
- Session 1: Aggregators, connecting bank accounts & importing CSVs
- Session 2: Understanding the Foundation Template
And here’s what’s coming next:
- Session 4 (Fri 1/23): Creating a Budget for 2026
- Session 5 (Fri 1/30): Leaning on the Tiller Community
- Session 6 (Fri 2/6): Your questions, answered!
If you’re looking for a simple roadmap for the year, we also recommend revisiting Tiller’s Five Steps to Financial Well-Being—from understanding your money and building a safety net, to managing debt and spending with purpose. It’s a practical way to make progress no matter where you’re starting.
Here’s to a year of clearer insights, confident decisions, and money habits that actually stick. We hope to see you on the webinar tomorrow!
Warmly, The Tiller Team

normalizedSubject: Ils ne répondent plus ? Plan d’action en 7 jours
normalizedText:
Avant d’escalader, on vérifie :

* leur santé financière (poursuites, dettes — en quelques minutes),

* l’intensité de vos relances (appels/textos quotidiens, visite de chantier, propositions de rencontre),

* le ton : rester ferme et amical (on paie ses amis avant ses ennemis).

subject: Les 8 documents qui accélèrent votre recouvrement

normalizedText:

1. Contrat signé et avenants

2. Soumission/bon de commande

3. Preuves de livraison/exécution

5. Relevé détaillé du compte

subject: 🔒 Your Trust Is Not for Sale: AI, Privacy, and Tiller’s Promise
normalizedSubject: 🔒 Your Trust Is Not for Sale: AI, Privacy, and Tiller’s Promise
normalizedText:
[Image "Tiller+hero.png?expires=1782967788&signature=71165bbdc69f4e4e8dd19102fad1ee4b64eed69d97dd519c2eaccdd7c0f08d99&req=diAjH8F9lIhdWfMW2XS%2FiU76XQNJiLrcfsFV7ibJK4ILxFsEQEk%3D%0A"]
Hi OstéoPeinture,
Tiller was founded from day one with a clear commitment to privacy. Our first customers were friends, and we didn’t want to see their data. That tradition continues today. The humans at Tiller don’t see your transactions and balances.
Now with the prevalence of AI tools, our position on privacy is increasingly important. You can choose to use Gemini in Google Sheets or Copilot and Claude in Excel. We’re exploring opt-in ways to connect with ChatGPT and other models. The choice is yours, and these tools are available only if you opt-in.
Learn more about Tiller's privacy and security.
At Tiller, we think AI should work for you only if you choose. Sharing your data is never the price of admission.
That's why we built Tiller on this simple promise: Tiller will never sell, share, or monetize your financial data. Not for AI. Not for ads. Not ever.
Here's what that means in practice:
- You're in control. Your financial data flows to your private spreadsheets where you control it. We don't aggregate, analyze, or sell your transaction data to third parties. ​
- We're customer-funded, not VC-funded. We work for you. We don't answer to investors demanding we "unlock data value" or "build revenue streams from user insights." Our business model is refreshingly simple: you subscribe, we deliver. ​
- Bank-grade security. We connect to your financial institutions through the same aggregators trusted by the largest US banks. We use 256-bit AES encryption, and we never see or store your bank credentials. ​
- Your data, your exit. If you ever cancel Tiller, you keep your private spreadsheets and we delete your data from Tiller's system. spreadsheets stay yours, independent and intact. Want us to delete your Tiller data entirely? Just ask. We'll confirm within 24 hours.
Why can we make these promises? Because our incentives are aligned with yours. You're not our product. You're our customer. And your trust is not for sale.
Questions about privacy, security, or how Tiller works? Just reply, or visit tiller.com/security.
[Image "Getting+Started+Webinar+%281%29.png?expires=1782967788&signature=bf4eba5a391f33d291ec68c4f3664ded9b857dac7af16bbe97b0498946d4bd46&req=diAjH8F9nIVcXPMW2XS%2FiY2El%2FdJyT2lDsIjiqM3jiHlOTSXMTM%3D%0A"] 🎓 New Year, New Habits: 6-Part Getting Started with Tiller Webinar Series
With the start of 2026, Tiller welcomed thousands of new users ready to reach their money goals. If that's you, welcome👋! ​ Whether you're brand new or a longtime user, these sessions are packed with shortcuts, best practices, and answers to the questions we hear most.
Here's what we covered:
- Session 1: Getting Started
- Session 2: Understanding the Foundation Template
- Session 3: Creating and Optimizing Categories
- Session 4: Building Your 2026 Budget
- Session 5: Leaning on the Tiller Community
- Session 6: Your Questions, Answered!
[Image "Tiller+hero+%282%29.png?expires=1782967788&signature=9d4c7b4eb3a36845e51a7acff23746d9fbaf1db187941a8f064401ad9ddfc019&req=diAjH8F5moZaX%2FMW2XS%2FiYxY%2B0l%2Bid6469mYuGxePNLvEMVsc7Y%3D%0A"]
👥 Community Spotlight: Real Problems, Real Solutions
Tiller's community is where members solve problems, build tools, and help each other win with money. Here are two examples from just this month:
Investment Tracking Gets Easier
Investment tracking is one of the most-requested features, and while Tiller doesn't offer it out of the box yet, our community has built the next best thing. Learn More.
Cash Flow Post-Retirement
When a user encountered challenges managing post-retirement expenses, the community rallied to help. This is what makes Tiller different: you're part of a community that makes the product better for everyone. Learn More.
QUICK TIPS & RESOURCES
- Stay inspired with the latest insights and templates on the Tiller Blog.
- Connect with other users, get answers, and share your own tips in the Tiller Community.
- Need help? Our top-rated support team is always here for you.
- And remember: You always own your data with Tiller. No ads, no selling your information, ever. Your data is your data.
Warmly, The Tiller Team

[Image "upload_12431548540192493044.png?expires=1782967788&signature=237141b5278c6f896d3d203337f25db965728018c2453c8c34018156a0306ddb&req=dSguH8t%2Bm4ReWfMW2XS%2FiU1Aems3ZCiquBI8v%2BvfTt1D%2FMAZ%2F2k%3D%0A"] Read more Tiller reviews →

normalizedText:
** Rafraîchissez votre espace en 2026 !
------------------------------------------------------------

Salut!

Alors que nous planifions nos projets pour 2026, LTM Peinture prévoit d’ajouter 1 ou 2 nouveaux projets à son calendrier dans la région de Montréal. Votre espace pourrait être l’un d’eux !

En tant qu’entreprise locale, nous comprenons l’importance de l’image, de la durabilité et du respect des échéances pour votre organisation.

Que ce soit pour :
* Peinture intérieure de bureaux
* Rafraîchissement extérieur
* Entrepôts et bâtiments industriels
* Commerces
* Immeubles multi-locatifs

Notre objectif est clair : vous offrir un résultat impeccable, livré à temps et sans tracas.

Si vous envisagez des travaux cette année, nous serions ravis de vous proposer une soumission gratuite sur place et d’échanger avec vous sur vos besoins.

Au plaisir de collaborer avec vous,

Alberto Lombardo Tullo

LTM Peinture

+1(514) 655-0914

https://ltmpeinture.com (https://ltmpeinture.com/) /

____________________________________________________________________________

** Refresh your space in 2026 !
------------------------------------------------------------

Hey!

As we plan our projects for 2026, LTM Painting is looking to add 1 or 2 new projects to our schedule in the Montreal area—your space could be one of them!

As a local company, we understand how important image, durability, and meeting deadlines are for your organization.

Whether it’s for:
* Interior office painting
* Exterior refresh
* Warehouses and industrial buildings
* Retail spaces
* Multi-unit residential buildings

Our goal is simple: to deliver flawless results, on time, and hassle-free.

If you’re considering any updates this year, we’d be happy to provide a free on-site estimate and discuss your needs.

We look forward to the opportunity to work with you,

Alberto Lombardo Tullo

LTM Peinture

subject: Tips for using your new inbox
normalizedSubject: Tips for using your new inbox
normalizedText:
Tips for using your new inbox
[image: Gmail]

Welcome to your inbox
[image: Search]
Find emails fast
With the power of Google Search in your inbox, you can archive
<https://support.google.com/mail/answer/6576?hl=en&utm_source=gmailwelcomeemail&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmailwelcome>
all your email and find it
<https://support.google.com/mail/answer/6593?hl=en&utm_source=gmailwelcomeemail&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmailwelcome>
later in a flash. Your inbox stays tidy, and you never need to worry about
what to keep.
[image: Personalize]
Personalize OstéoPeinture Mail
Customize inbox backgrounds, email signatures, and other options in
OstéoPeinture
Mail settings
<https://support.google.com/mail/answer/6562?hl=en&utm_source=gmailwelcomeemail&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmailwelcome>.
Review and adjust your privacy and security settings at My Account
<https://myaccount.google.com/>.
[image: Organize]
Organize your email
You can organize email with labels
<https://support.google.com/mail/answer/118708?hl=en&utm_source=gmailwelcomeemail&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmailwelcome>,
which are like folders, but you can add more than one label to a message.
You can also use filters
<https://support.google.com/mail/answer/6579?hl=en&utm_source=gmailwelcomeemail&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmailwelcome>
to automatically sort and categorize messages as they come in.
[image: Social]
Chat and meet directly from your inbox
Message with contacts in Google Chat
<https://support.google.com/chat/answer/9341104?hl=en&utm_source=gmailwelcomeemail&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmailwelcome>
and start video meetings with up to 100 people in Google Meet
<https://support.google.com/mail/answer/9822902?hl=en&utm_source=gmailwelcomeemail&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmailwelcome>
all without leaving Gmail.

Get training and tips
Find Gmail guides, tips, cheat sheets, help switching from Microsoft®
Outlook®, and more at the Google Workspace Learning Center
<https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9259748?hl=en&utm_source=gmailwelcomeemail&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmailwelcome>
.
Visit the Learning Center
<https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9259748?hl=en&utm_source=gmailwelcomeemail&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gmailwelcome>

Happy emailing,
The Gmail Team

about important changes to your Google Cloud product or account.*

in-person visit to assess the space, discuss design preferences, and review

provide a customized quote. Let us know what works best.

subject: Inquiry About Painting Services
normalizedText:
Hi,

I hope this message finds you well. I’m reaching out on behalf of Robyn to
inquire about your painting services. We have several areas in the home
that need attention, including a staircase, and are looking for
professional assistance.

Could you please provide some details about how your pricing works? For
example:

- Do you charge by the hour, square footage, or project? How much would
it cost?
- Are there additional costs for areas like staircases or hard-to-reach
spaces?
- May I know what would be the process? I have here the floor plan for
your reference if that helps.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
--

normalizedSubject: Soumission — Travaux de Réfection — Hôtel Alt
normalizedText:
Bonjour Matthieu,

Voici notre soumission pour les travaux de réfection à l'Hôtel Alt sur Peel.

Ci-joint, notre devis détaillant le coût des travaux prévus pour chacune
des 7 chambres affectées, ainsi que les plans correspondants désignant les
différents murs à remettre à neufs et leurs finis respectifs — tel que
convenu.

N’hésitez pas à me faire signe si vous avez des questions ou avez besoin de
précisions supplémentaires.

J'attends de vos nouvelles.

Bien cordialement,

*Loric St-Onge Entrepreneur en finition et en peinture514-266-2028*

normalizedText:
Bien reçu, Ulysse. Merci du retour.
J'imagine que vous allez repeindre par vous-même dans ce cas — n'hésites
pas si jamais tu as besoin de conseils, ça va me faire plaisir de vous
orienter un peu.

Au plaisir,

Loric

signatureBlock:
Loric

On Tue, Mar 18, 2025 at 7:25 PM Ulysse Desjardins-Provost <
ulyssedesjardins@hotmail.com> wrote:

subject: Re: Peinture fer forgé?
normalizedText:
Bonjour,

Oui, pour la porte d’entrée on peut entreprendre la restauration de la
porte ancestrale avant de repeindre. Généralement on charge environ 600$
pour une porte d’entrée double comme ça avec toute la préparation incluse.
Par contre les coûts pour la restauration varie beaucoup selon l’ampleur
des dommages, généralement entre 200-600$ — il faudrait qu’on passe voir.

Même chose pour le fer forgé, on devra passer pour regarder de plus près
l’état du métal. Ce sera probablement autour de 700-1000$ pour la clôture
avant, et un prix similaire pour l’arrière. Le tout évidemment est à
confirmer avec un estimé sur place, ça varie selon la quantité de rouille
et donc de préparation nécessaire.

Pour ce qui est de la cédule, on a déjà quelques contrats de booké pour le
début de la saison extérieure vers début mai si on se fie aux dernières
années. Ça pourrait aller au mois de juin si ça vous convient? On aura un
meilleur sens de nos dispos dans les prochaines semaines.

Qu’en penses-tu?

Loric St-Onge
Entrepreneur peintre et ostéopathe
514-266-2028
#201-80 St-Viateur E., Montréal, QC, H2T 1A6
www.osteopeinture.com

subject: RE: 423-7230 Rue Alexandra, demande de soumission
normalizedText:
Bonsoir Loric,

Merci beaucoup pour l’appel d’hier, ça a éclairé notre décision et en rediscutant avec ma conjointe nous en sommes venus à la conclusion que notre budget manque de moitié.
Je te remercie d’avoir pris le temps de m’avoir appelé et de m’avoir expliqué ton processus dans de plus grands détails, je serai peut être client potentiel dans un autre 5 ans !

Bonne soirée à toi,

Ulysse

De : OsteoPeinture <osteopeinture@gmail.com>
Envoyé : March 15, 2025 7:47 PM
À : Ulysse Desjardins-Provost <ulyssedesjardins@hotmail.com>
Objet : Re: 423-7230 Rue Alexandra, demande de soumission

Bonsoir Ulysse,

Comme convenu, voici votre soumission pour les travaux de peinture de votre nouveau condo.

Le prix inclut une préparation minimale, considérant que vos murs et plinthes semblent en bon état. Si des fissures ou d’autres imperfections supplémentaires nécessitent des réparations, ou si les murs nécessitent une 3e couche, nous pourrons ajuster le prix en conséquence. Autrement, nous nous en tiendrons au prix établi.

Les travaux devraient durer 4 à 5 jours et seraient terminés le 30 mai au plus tard.

N’hésitez pas à me contacter pour toute question ou précision supplémentaire.

J'attends de vos nouvelles!

subject: Door hanger distributor and/or painter
normalizedText:
Hi. My name is Stellios and I'm 43 years olds. I'm currently unemployed and
looking for a job. I'm friendly, outgoing and like to work in groups. I
used to paint for myself and others for a few years and enjoyed it very
much. I still paint all my family members homes whenever they need it. I
can also do some plaster repairs. I'm interested in both door hanger
distributor and/or painter.

I do not currently have a cv prepared because my last employer was a
transport company that I worked at for almost 10 years as a dispatcher. I
can create one if needed.

I can be reached by email here or phone at 438-725-1594. I look forward to
hearing from you

subject: RE: 423-7230 Rue Alexandra, demande de soumission
normalizedText:
Bonsoir Loric,

Merci beaucoup pour la soumission détaillée, c’est définitivement la soumission la plus claire et la plus minutieuse que j’aie reçue jusqu’à maintenant.
Moi et ma conjointe aimerions, si possible, discuter de quelques ajustements possibles qui reflèteraient mieux notre situation:

Concernant les Frais Généraux (450$)
Étant donné que le condo sera complètement vide pendant toute la durée des travaux (nous ne déménagerons qu'après la fin des travaux), les éléments liés à la protection des meubles et au nettoyage quotidien ne seraient pas nécessaires.
De plus, votre bureau étant situé à proximité de notre condo, serait-il possible de réviser ces frais à la baisse?

Je demeure disponible pour en discuter au téléphone si jamais vous préférez.

Bonne soirée !

Ulysse

subject: 423-7230 Rue Alexandra, demande de soumission
normalizedText:
Bonjour,
Je me suis fait référré à vos service par ma grand-mère (Denyse Provost) qui a toujours étée très satisfaite par votre travail sur sa maison à Outremont.

Nous avons eu une offre d'achat acceptée sur un condo dans le Mile-Ex et nous prenons possession de celui-ci le 23 mai prochain.
Celui-ci fait 815 pieds carrés et nous aimerions repeindre les murs, cadres de portes et moulures dans un blanc/blanc-gris. Nous pensons toutefois garder le plafond telquel.

Auriez-vous de la disponibilité entre le 23 et le 30 mai prochain pour ce contrat?
Serait-il possible d'avoir un estimé pour les travaux demandés?

Merci beaucoup!

Ulysse Desjardins-Provost
signatureBlock:
Merci beaucoup!

Ulysse Desjardins-Provost

subject: Re: 423-7230 Rue Alexandra, demande de soumission
normalizedText:
Je vous joins également les photo de la fiche duProprio ci-joint si vous avez de la difficulté à consulter les photos sur le lien vu que l'annonce a été fermée. La qualité est réduite un peu mais ça donne une bonne idée.

Je suis également disponible pour un appel téléphonique dès ce pm et demain toute la journée, vous pouvez me joindre au 514-922-1561.
Je réponds aussi par sms!

Je peux aussi demander au vendeur pour une visite en personne.

Bonne journée,

Ulysse

subject: Update on Front Columns Capping Project
normalizedSubject: Update on Front Columns Capping Project
normalizedText:
Hi Carol,

I hope you're doing well!

I wanted to follow up on the project we discussed to cap your three front
entrance columns with wood for a more durable solution than simply filling
the cracks.

I finally took some time to go over the details and have attached some
sketches to give you a sense of the design I have in mind. Using pine
planks, the materials would cost around $1,000 give or take. However, the
labor involved is more detailed than I initially anticipated, bringing the
total estimate to about $4,000 - 4,500 — definitely more costly than I had
initially thought.

To be upfront, my experience with this type of detailed custom carpentry
work is not extensive, and it turns out to be more complex than expected —
building the capping frames at 45 degrees to minimize seams, mounting them
plumb and square around the existing columns, securing them properly while
keeping screw holes to a minimum, etc. This level of precision takes time,
especially when you don't do it often.

That’s why I’m reaching out now — I want to be honest with you. I don't
feel it makes sense for us to undertake this for you. I’m certain you could
find a contractor who specializes in this kind of work and could do a
suitable job, faster and cheaper this season. I have no one to recommend
unfortunately, but I believe it's worth researching.

Please give me a call when you have a moment so we can discuss this and
find a resolution that makes sense to you.

Best regards,

*Loric St-Onge *

*Painting contractor and osteopath <http://www.loricstonge.com/>*

514-266-2028

#201-80 St-Viateur E.Montréal, QC, H2T 1A6
*www.osteopeinture.com <http://www.osteopeinture.com/>*

subject: Quote — Home Makeover Phase 2 — 649 Roslyn Ave.
normalizedSubject: Quote — Home Makeover Phase 2 — 649 Roslyn Ave.
normalizedText:
Good evening to both of you,

Hope you're doing well.

Attached is the full quote for Phase 2 — thanks for your patience.

Now that Phase 1 is complete, we have a much clearer sense of the work and
potential repairs needed for the rest of the house. I’ve adjusted the
ballparks accordingly to minimize surprises.

You’ll notice the price is higher than our initial discussion, mainly due
to the additional prep work required for the trim — doors, frames, windows,
baseboards, etc. As you've seen, much of the paint is cracking and flaking,
which means we need to flake until it's sound, resurface, sand, clean, oil
prime any exposed wood, and caulk all cracks. It’s a time-intensive process
for a solid result, and we absorbed part of this extra time after
underestimating the prep work in the rooms we just finished.

To keep things transparent, I’ve itemized the pricing for each component —
windows, doors, ceilings, etc. — based on the current state of your house.
Of course, each room varies, so the numbers fluctuate. I’ve also included
the additional prep time for the office and small bedroom — in case you
wanted to tone down the level of detail in those areas.

Lastly, I’ve added a realistic projection for the repairs we discussed so
you have a solid estimate of what to expect.

I trust this all makes sense, but let me know how you feel about it — if
you have any questions or if there’s anything you’d like to adjust.

For scheduling, we’re aiming to start on *Monday, March 3rd*, if that still
works for you. We expect the work to take *about 3 to 4 weeks*, depending
on the scope of repairs.

Take the time to go over the quote and we'll speak soon.

Best,

*Loric St-Onge *

*Painting contractor and osteopath <http://www.loricstonge.com/>*

subject: Stairs Paint St Lambert
normalizedText:
Hey Lubo,

These are the photos of the work needed to be painted for our stairs and
door. I've also attached two photos of inspiration from another house we
had in mind for the door and the stairs as well.

There are 14 steps that will need to be painted black, the ramp leading up
to the upstairs will also be painted black

Four of the big posts as well as three half posts would need to be painted
in black. These posts span from the stairs going up and railing from the
stairs going down to the basement as shown in this other pictures.

We also would like to paint our master bedroom door on the upstairs side in
Black and the surrounding moldings around the door in what. And inspiration
photo from another house is also attached to give you the idea.

Please let me know if you have any questions on the job and you can always
call me to discuss at 514-889-3628.

Best Regards,

Antonio Morello
signatureBlock:
Best Regards,

Antonio Morello

subject: Updated Cost Breakdown  —  Painting Work  — 649 Roslyn Ave.
normalizedSubject: Updated Cost Breakdown — Painting Work — 649 Roslyn Ave.
normalizedText:
Good evening,

I hope you both had a restful weekend.

Please find attached the updated cost breakdown for the painting project so
far. This includes a projection of all costs for this first phase, with
adjustments to the living room estimate based on the time required for the
trim repairs in the master bedroom.

You'll notice that any remaining work is highlighted in yellow — these are
projected yet realistic costs, but they may be adjusted up or down
depending on the actual labor time required. We plan to complete this first
phase on Friday and send you a final invoice then.

As for the rest of the house, you'll receive the finalized quote by
tomorrow evening at the latest.
Let me know if you have any questions in the meantime.

See you tomorrow!

Best,

subject: Re: (no subject)
normalizedText:
Bonjour,
1. Plafond en plâtre aussi
2. Plafond en blanc standard seulement dans la petite chambre. Le plafond de la pièce double n'a pas besoin d'être repeint. Il y a seulement des moulures autour de la fenêtre de la petite chambre qui sont à repeindre. Pas de plinthe ou de porte à peindre.
3. La même couleur : blanc, dans les deux pièces.
4. Nous emménageons le 20 février donc avant cette date, il n'y a qu'un piano dans la pièce double. Après le 20 février, il va y avoir le minimum de meubles. Dans la pièce double il y aura un sofa en plus du piano et dans la petite chambre il y aura un lit superposé.
Les photos 8, 9 et 10 sont de la pièce double où il faut boucher les petits trous et repeindre les murs. Le plafond, la moulure du plafond, l'arche, les portes et cadres de portes, les boiseries et les plinthes ne sont pas à repeindre.
Les autres photos sont de la petite chambre où il faut réparer le plafond, boucher les petits trous, repeindre le plafond, les murs et les moulures autour de la fenêtre. Les portes et boiseries ne doivent pas être peintes.
Nous allons enlever les plaques des interrupteurs et des prises de courant et enlever ou cacher les thermostats.
Salutations,
Erick
signatureBlock:
Salutations,
Erick

subject: Gauthier - Peinture de bibliothèque built-in
normalizedText:
Bonjour,

Je cherche quelqu'un pour effectuer un travail de peinture pour une
bibliothèque 12' de largeur built-in sur le Plateau Mont Royal mi-mars.

Il y a des cabinets sur le bas et des étagères sur le haut. En pièce jointe
vous trouverez un visuel pour donner une idée. La peinture sera faite après
installation. Sur le dessin, la peinture est représentée en bleu, le centre
de la bibliothèque sera en bois et ne sera pas à peindre.

En bas il y a des portes coulissantes et l'intérieur des cabinets (de 23"
prof) à peindre.

Matériel: MDF qui sera déjà sablé

Laissez-moi savoir si c'est quelque chose que vous faites et si oui, si
vous pouvez me donner un devis!

N'hésitez pas à m'appeler au besoin!

Merci et bonne journée à vous!
Aleksandra

514-512-8733

Objet : Devis pour Travaux de Peinture — 235 rue Peel

Bonjour Mr. Beauchemin,

J’espère que vous allez bien.
Comme convenu, voici le devis détaillé pour les travaux de peinture de votre condo.

Nous avons bien pris en compte vos demandes et les conditions particulières que vous avez mentionnées.
Nous vous avons inclus une couche de rafraîchissement dans le forfait initial, avec la possibilité d'ajouter une couche supplémentaire si nécessaire.
Avec la peinture haut-de-gamme que nous utilisons, bien souvent une couche peut suffire pour rafraîchir l'espace.
Laissez-moi savoir si cela vous convient.

Les travaux pourront être réalisés la semaine du 3 mars — la date exacte sera à confirmer.

N’hésitez pas à me contacter si vous avez des questions.

J'attends de vos nouvelles!

Je suis disponible pour toute question.

subject: Devis pour Travaux de Peinture — 235 rue Peel
normalizedSubject: Devis pour Travaux de Peinture — 235 rue Peel
normalizedText:
Bonjour Mr. Beauchemin,

J’espère que vous allez bien.
Comme convenu, voici le devis détaillé pour les travaux de peinture de
votre condo.

Nous avons bien pris en compte vos demandes et les conditions particulières
que vous avez mentionnées.
Nous vous avons inclus une couche de rafraîchissement dans le forfait
initial, avec la possibilité d'ajouter une couche supplémentaire si
nécessaire.
Avec la peinture haut-de-gamme que nous utilisons, bien souvent une couche
peut suffire pour rafraîchir l'espace.
Laissez-moi savoir si cela vous convient.

Les travaux pourront être réalisés la semaine du 3 mars — la date exacte
sera à confirmer.

N’hésitez pas à me contacter si vous avez des questions.

J'attends de vos nouvelles!

Bien cordialement,

*Loric St-Onge *

*Entrepreneur peintre et ostéopathe <http://www.loricstonge.com>*

subject: Re: Painting Quote Ostéopeinture
normalizedText:
Bonjour Lubo,

Bien recu. Ceci nous convient.

*
Pouvez-vous svp procurer les echantillons de peinture pour les cabinets? Pour confirmer, nous sommes entre SW2851 Sage Green Light et SW6167 Garden Gate.
*
Pas de soucis pour le salon, on peut l'evaluer une fois que vous etes sur place.
*
Je vous envoie un depot de $2,200 a cette adresse courriel. Le mot de passe sera "azzopardi".
*
Serait-il mieux pour vous si nous vidons nos cabinets de cuisine avant votre arrivee?
*
Pouvez-vous svp nous laisser savoir demain soir si vous croyez arriver mercredi ou jeudi? Ca nous aidera a gerer nos horaires.

Bonne soiree,
JC

________________________________

subject: Re: Estimé pour Travaux de Peinture
normalizedText:
Bonjour,
Je n'habite pas encore les lieux.
La transaction sera notariée avant le 1er mars.
Je veux seulement une estimation.
Il s'agit d'un condo de 460 pi.ca avec deux garde-robes.
Le plafond n'est pas à peinturer.
Blanc satin
Il n’y aura aucun meuble sur le plancher.
Tout ce qui est accroché aux murs sera retirés et les trous seront bouchés.
Les plaques murales et poignées de porte seront retirées.
Les travaux pourront être réalisés entre le 3 et le 17 mars...selon vos disponibilités.
Si votre véhicule est de grandeur standard, vous pourrez vous stationner à l'intérieur.
Voici des photos.
Luc

subject: Re: Painting Quote Ostéopeinture
normalizedText:
Bonjour Jean Christophe,

Voici le devis ajusté en fonction des changements demandés.

Vous allez remarquer que je n'ai pas inclus un prix pour le plafond, et
trim du salon du au fait qu'on n'y avait pas mis d'attention durant
l'estimation. Alors j'aimerais qu'on le voit en personne de nouveau pour
vous donner un prix.

Pour les tests de couleurs, voulez vous qu'on se charge de se procurer les
échantillons et faire les tests?

Aussi, pour ne pas avoir de surprises, juste vous mentionner qu'on prend un
dépôt d'environ 30% du prix avant taxes, alors en ajustant le devis, le
montant de celui-ci a augmenté.

Comme je l'ai mentionné par téléphone, on prévoit débuter les travaux
Mercredi, ou Jeudi de cette semaine.

SVP laissez-moi savoir si vous avez des questions ou si vous voulez amener
d'autres changements à la soumission.

Merci, et à bientôt!

Lubo,
et l'équipe Ostéopeinture

subject: Re: Painting Quote Ostéopeinture
normalizedText:
Bonsoir Lubo,

Suite a notre discussion plus tot aujourd’hui, nous sommes prets a aller de l’avant avec les travaux proposes.

Pour la cuisine, si possible, nous aimerions tester les couleurs Sage Green Light et Garden Gate.

Pour le choix de la peinture, nous sommes confortables avec vos specs proposes pour le plafond et les cabinets (votre equivalent d’Emerald Urethane Trim). Nous aimerions les cabinets en spray.

Serait-il possible de svp inclure la chambre a coucher principale, ainsi que le plafond/trim du salon (addition), dans le devis? Nous vous retournerons une copie signee ainsi qu’un depot.

Le nom de l’entité pour le devis et facturation sera Fiducie Familiale Jean-Pierre Azzopardi.

Cordialement,
JC

Get Outlook for iOS<https://aka.ms/o0ukef>

subject: Re: Painting Quote Ostéopeinture
normalizedText:
Bonjour Lubo et équipe OsteoPeinture,

Merci beaucoup pour l'estimé. Nous avons quelques questions:

1.
What would be the incremental cost of including painting the ceiling, trim, and doors of the master bedroom?
2.
Will prepping of doors, cabinets and trim include sanding where required to achieve smooth/level finish (ie. missing existing paint, etc.)
3.
For materials, we currently have 2gal of primer and 4gal of Duration in Oxford White Matte. Is it easier for you if we procure the materials ourselves (capped credit capacity or otherwise)?
4.
Is the Promar 400 to paint the ceilings? Is it worthwhile to stick to Duration for durability?
5.
We would like to use Sage Green Light rather than white on the cabinets and were recommended Emerald Urethane Trim. What are your thoughts on this?
6.
Could you please confirm whether you need to remove the cabinets from the walls if we choose to spray them, or will you only need to remove the doors?

Si c'est plus facile d'en discuter au téléphone, on peut s'en parler demain en après-midi ou en soirée.

Cordialement,
JC
514-815-9363

subject: Peinture bureau
normalizedText:
Bonjour,
Nous aimerions peinturer un mur de notre cuisine du bureau (voir photo).
Notre bureau est dans la Maison du développement durable et nous pouvons seulement utiliser peinture avec la certification 'green seal' avec zéro VOC.
Et si possible, nous souhaitons faire les travaux un vendredi après-midi/soir. Pourriez-vous m'envoyer une soumission?

Merci,

Elena Lopez Valero

normalizedText:
First Name: Luc
Last Name : Beauchemin
E-mail: Luca.b@hotmail.com
Phone Number: 514 772 3722
Address: 235 Rue Peel, app. 1514 Montréal H3C 0P8
Deadline:
Message: Bonjour,

Il s'agit d'un condo de 460 pi.ca avec deux garde-robes.

Le plafond n'est pas à peinturer.

Blanc satin.

Il n’y aura aucun meuble sur le plancher;

Tous ce qui est accroché aux murs seront retiré et les trous seront bouché ;

Les plaques murales et poignés de porte seront retiré;

Les travaux pourront être réalisés entre le 3 et le 17 mars...selon vos disponibilités.

Si votre véhicule est de grandeur standard, vous pourrez vous stationner à l'intérieur.

Des photos sont disponibles.

Merci de communiquer avec moi par courriel.

Luc

WoW, vous êtes super gentil. J’apprécie grandement votre franchise et votre avis. Merci beaucoup. J’avoue qu’en vous lisant et qu’en regardant l’état des choses récemment, vous avez bien raison. Je veux aussi réparer l’allée et le mur de pierres donc je pense que je vais tout faire du même coup.

Je garde votre contact précieusement pour des travaux futurs.
