subject: Re: Estimate for B103-4100 Av Benny?
normalizedText:
Hi Graeme,

As I need to get approval from the condo board by providing your insurance
and this estimate, it is unlikely we'd be able to start on the 20ieth. I
am sure they will approve but they still need the time to do so.

Which of the week of 27 Oct, 3 Nov or 10 Nov would work instead?

Could you please share your insurance contract/certificate for me to send?

We'd briefly discussed, but could I also confirm you're ok to abide by the
restrictions of the condo?

- The working hours are: Monday to Friday 8AM to 5PM and no work is
allowed weekends and holidays
- The building's garbage and recycling bins cannot be used for disposing
of renovation debris
- Cannot take material through the main entrance - must use the patio
door or go through the garage (if using the the garage and need the
elevator for material need 72 hours notice from building to to put pads up
in it).

Assuming that all works for you, we'd love to go forward!

My only clarification for the estimate is the amount charged if there is
any major damage, though I agree with you, when we went through there did
not seem to be any that would need to be done. In the estimate it is 65$
but in the email it is 70$.

If that needs to be changed in the estimate and the date adjusted I'm happy
to sign as a contract and provide the deposit by e-transfer.

I have attached the form I submit to the condo board with the estimate and
insurance and will add the estimated start date and duration.

Thanks,
Lisa

Thanks,
Lisa

subject: Re: Estimate for B103-4100 Av Benny?
normalizedText:
Good evening Lisa,

For the scheduling: we have another contract booked for the week of the 3rd
of November, so it would have to be the week prior - 27th of Oct - or the
following week of Nov 10th. I assume it will depend on how fast the condo
board can approve the request, so let me know on your end how it unfolds
with them and we can go from there.

I will attach our insurance policy to this email, to note: our plan renews
on the 8th of November, so this is valid until then, I can send over the
updated document when we receive it from our insurance company, if it's
needed.

It's confirmed for the condo restrictions - we can agree to working around
all of these stipulations, not a problem. We will most likely use the patio
door for all our material so there should be no need for the elevator.

As for the repairs, yes that's my apologies, this is an old estimate
template that I was using by mistake. I have attached an updated
quote without a fixed start date and the repairs amount adjusted for you to
sign and send back.

Let me know if you have any other questions,

Regards,
Graeme

subject: [Ostéo Peinture] Contact 3 - Nouvel envoi
normalizedText:
First Name: Noemie
Last Name : Adrien
E-mail: noemie.adrien@live.com
Phone Number: 5149916505
Address: 472 Bloomfield
Deadline:
Message: Bonjour,
Nous avons récemment déménagé dans une maison ancestrale à Outremont.
Celle-ci comporte beaucoup de boiseries, lesquelles ne sont pas toutes en bon état.
Nous aimerions avoir l’avis d’un professionnel sur les boiseries qu’il vaudrait la peine de restaurer et celles qui pourraient tout simplement être peintes (en blanc, par exemple).
Il s’agit essentiellement de cadres de porte, de l’escalier principal et de panneaux muraux.
Nous aurions également besoin de peindre quelques calorifères à eau chaude qui n’ont pas été repeints lorsque nous avons fait repeindre toute la maison avant d’emménager.
Nous nous demandions aussi si vous effectuiez la pose de papier peint (pour un seul mur d’une toute petite salle d’eau).
Je vois que vos bureaux sont situés près de notre maison. J’ignore si vous offrez des visites à domicile, mais ce serait sans doute plus simple de vous montrer/expliquer le tout sur place.
Au plaisir,
Noémie C. Adrien
signatureBlock:
Nous nous demandions aussi si vous effectuiez la pose de papier peint (pour un seul mur d’une toute petite salle d’eau).

Au plaisir,
Noémie C. Adrien

normalizedSubject: Soumission — Escaliers de Secours — Réfection suite à Infiltration
normalizedText:
Salut Loric,

On y vas avec cette proposition.

Laisse moi savoir quand tu veux commencer.

Merci

Matthieu Bacchetti
Gérant de maintenance
ALT & Germain hôtel Montréal

Le 30 oct. 2025 à 12:52, OstéoPeinture <info@osteopeinture.com> a écrit :

﻿
Bonjour Matthieu,

Voici notre soumission pour les travaux de réfection des murs de vos escaliers de secours à l'Hôtel Alt sur Peel. Le devis ci-joint détaille un coût approximatif; l'ampleur des travaux étant à valider sur place.

Nous sommes disponibles dès la semaine prochaine pour le début des travaux.

Bien cordialement,

Loric St-Onge

Entrepreneur peintre

subject: [Ostéo Peinture] Contact 3 - Nouvel envoi
normalizedText:
First Name: Anne-Sophie
Last Name : Berg
E-mail: a.sophie.berg@gmail.com
Phone Number: 5148064185
Address: 5936 Waverly St
Deadline:
Message: Hello,

I’m looking to have several rooms repainted in my Mile End condo (2nd floor) and wanted to check if you’re currently taking on new projects. The work would include repainting, in white, the walls and ceilings of the entrance cubicle, hallway, one bedroom, living room, kitchen, and a small bathroom. There may be a few small plaster repairs needed as well.

In addition, I’d like to have a small section of baseboard and a cast iron radiator in another room (not being repainted) retouched.

The condo is furnished, so I’d also like to know if your team typically works around furniture and whether you provide the necessary coverings and floor protection.

Ideally, the work would be done between November 22nd and 29th, 2025. Could you please let me know if this is something you could take on and provide an estimate?

Thank you very much,

Anne-Sophie
signatureBlock:
Thank you very much,

Anne-Sophie

subject: [Ostéo Peinture] Contact 3 - Nouvel envoi

Address: 3526 Hotel De Ville

Message: Hello,
We have a small apartment in Plateau Montreal needing new paint. It is a bit under 600 sq ft with one long wall in stone so paint not needed. I have photos and measurements available if necessary.
Was wondering if you could have a look and give an estimate.
Thanks
Jim

TikTok for Painters: The Definitive Guide to Generating More Qualified Painting Leads

If you’re considering advertising your painting services on TikTok, you’re not crazy.

While your competitors are still relying solely on traditional marketing channels, savvy painting contractors are tapping into a
younger generation by leveraging a platform with over 1.5 billion active users who spend nearly an hour on the app every single
day.

So while TikTok ads can be a powerful tool for generating quality painting leads, there are a few caveats to be aware of.

Let’s jump in…

We hope you find value in this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and we want to take a moment to
ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from
future emails.

Why You’re Receiving This Email

You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve
previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your
information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us.

If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free
from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages.

Your Privacy is Important

We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold,
or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us
directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have.

You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs
clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction.

How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences

We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there are no hard feelings. You
can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below.

By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as
receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward,
and any changes will take effect promptly.

We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if
they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways.

Accessibility and Communication

If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email,
you can reach out directly by replying to this email. We aim to respond within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns
effectively.

Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any
feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share.

A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails

We aim to create a nonintrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages and
work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide
updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know.

Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can improve and refine
our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee that every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to review
and consider your input carefully.

Legal Information

We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and
maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every
email you receive meets these requirements.

If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and
accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed.

A Final Note

Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way
you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel,
we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you.

We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and
we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you.

This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication

subject: Peindre les murs autour d'une cage d'escalier?
normalizedSubject: Peindre les murs autour d'une cage d'escalier?
normalizedText:
Bonjour,

J'habite dans le plateau, et je voudrais peindre plusieurs murs autour des
escaliers. Ça commençait comme un projet DIY, mais je n'ai pas la confiance
de peindre des murs tels hauts au-dessous des escaliers. Voici un lien des
diapositives avec des photos
<https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1-SH0cD41IwO--OzvG3PvK-vS0A10DVjMNhs6-QHatac/edit?usp=sharing>
pour expliquer le projet.

Pourriez-vous me donner une estimation de prix et du temps pour ce projet,
et quand est votre prochaine disponibilité?

Merci beaucoup,
-Kirk
signatureBlock:
et quand est votre prochaine disponibilité?

-Kirk

subject: [Ostéo Peinture] Contact 3 - Nouvel envoi
normalizedText:
First Name: Tania
Last Name : Kirian
E-mail: tetiana.kirian@gmail.com
Phone Number: 438 979 2498
Address: 931 -937 Boulevard Jean-Paul-Vincent, Longueuil
Deadline: spring 2026
Message: Hi,

Hope you are doing well.

We'd like to check whether you are providing the services in Longueuil as well or only the areas in Montreal that are listed on the site? We'd like to paint interior of 2 three-stored apartment buildings (931 and 937 boul. Jean-Paul Vincent), walls, stairs and railings, also a minor restoration might be needed, as we have a few little cracks in the walls, etc. Please let me know if you are working in Longueuil and whether we can arrange a catch up for an estimate.

Many thanks in advance,
Tania

subject: Candidature spontanée – Aide peintre
normalizedText:
Bonjour,

Je me permets de vous écrire afin de vous proposer ma candidature pour un
poste d’aide peintre au sein de votre entreprise.

Passionnée par le domaine de la peinture et du travail manuel, je souhaite
développer mes compétences dans un environnement professionnel et
dynamique. J’ai déjà acquis de l’expérience dans des travaux de peinture.
Je suis motivée, sérieuse, ponctuelle et j’apprends rapidement.

Je vous remercie de l’attention portée à ma candidature et vous prie
d’agréer, Madame, Monsieur, mes salutations distinguées.

sincères salutations.

Syrine MASTOURI
signatureBlock:
sincères salutations.

Syrine MASTOURI

subject: Re: [Ostéo Peinture] Contact 3 - Nouvel envoi
normalizedText:
Hi Loric,

Thanks for coming back with the update.
We'll make 2026 budget soon and may come back next year closer to the
spring time.

Thank you, wishing you and the team as well Happy New Year!

Best regards,
Tania

subject: [Ostéo Peinture] Contact 3 - Nouvel envoi
normalizedText:
First Name: Georgia
Last Name : Kouroumali
E-mail: georgiakour12@gmail.com
Phone Number: 5148166510
Address: 1614, av des Pins O.
Deadline:
Message: • Escalier et corridors : Installation de moulures décoratives (caissons/boiseries) sur la partie inférieure du mur de l'escalier. Peinture des murs, des nouvelles moulures et des barreaux en « White Dove » (OC-17). La main courante et les poteaux de départ doivent être peints en « Urbane Bronze » (SW 7048), fini satiné.
• Salon et salle à manger en L : (environ 560 pi²) La majorité des murs et des moulures en « White Dove ». Un mur d’accent (mur du foyer), incluant sa moulure de plafond (o’gee), doit être peint en « Urbane Bronze ».
• Chambres (2) : Une chambre (environ 300 pi²) en « Anchors Aweigh » (SW 9179) et une autre (environ 300 pi²) en « Essex Green » de Benjamin Moore (HC-188). Les deux pièces nécessitent un apprêt teinté foncé et un fini mat.
• Salles de bain (2) : Murs et moulures en « White Dove » (Satiné). Une petite section du plafond d'une des salles de bain nécessite une réparation suite à une ancienne fuite, suivie d’une mise en peinture.
• Portes : 8 portes à préparer et à peindre en « Urbane Bronze » (Satiné).

subject: [Ostéo Peinture] Contact us - Nouvel envoi
normalizedText:
Name: Sophie Dufresne
Phone Number: 5146794637
copy of Address: 659 Ave Belmont
Échéance: Aucune
Message: Bonsoir,

J’ai des retouches à effectuer à l’intérieur de notre demeure.
- repeindre un mur dans la chambre de mon fils
- peindre les embouts de « pipes » de nos radiateurs
- plâtrer et peindre quelques défauts.

Une visite serait nécessaire afin que vous puissiez bien comprendre l’étendue mais je suppose que ça prendrai une journée de travail.

Merci!

subject: [Ostéo Peinture] Contact 3 - Nouvel envoi
normalizedText:
First Name: Reuben
Last Name : Ramsay
E-mail: rbn.ramsay@gmail.com
Phone Number:
Address:
Deadline:
Message: Hello,

We'd like two different quotes.

Option 1: 1000 sqft apartment, walls and ceilings. Possible wallpaper for one or two feature walls. For bedrooms, ceiling not necessary. Lcoation in little italy. Kitchen does not need to be painted, nor the bathroom. There is a mezzainine with spiral staircase that has to be painted.

Option 2: paint two rooms with walls and ceilings, and 2 feature walls
signatureBlock:
Option 1: 1000 sqft apartment, walls and ceilings. Possible wallpaper for one or two feature walls. For bedrooms, ceiling not necessary. Lcoation in little italy. Kitchen does not need to be painted, nor the bathroom. There is a mezzainine with spiral staircase that has to be painted.

Option 2: paint two rooms with walls and ceilings, and 2 feature walls

subject: Re: Soumission Peinture
normalizedText:
Aucun problème ! En fait, je n’ai pas eu le temps de la lire attentivement,
ayant été occupée.

Mon conjoint est en transit vers le travail aujourd’hui et je la lui
transmet. Je te reviens lundi?

Sophie
signatureBlock:
Mon conjoint est en transit vers le travail aujourd’hui et je la lui
transmet. Je te reviens lundi?

Sophie

subject: Re: Soumission Peinture
normalizedText:
Allô Loric,

Merci beaucoup pour ta soumission! On est prêts à vous donner le contrat.

Tu m’appelles pour en discuter? Je suis pas mal occupée aujourd’hui jusqu’à
6:00pm environ. Sinon demain je suis libre toute la journée.

Merci

Sophie
signatureBlock:
Merci

Sophie

subject: Re: 3892 Ave Laval — Soumission Peinture & Plâtrage
normalizedText:
Bonjour,

Voici la soumission signée.
Juste une précision concernant la couleur des murs, il est noté une seule
couleur alors que nous aimerions 2 couleurs dans la salle à manger : une
couleur au-dessus du soubassement et une autre pour le soubassement (qui
sera la même couleur que le contour des portes).

Bien cordialement,
Ludivine

Le dim. 1 févr. 2026, à 21 h 56, OstéoPeinture <info@osteopeinture.com> a
écrit :

subject: [Ostéo Peinture] Contact 3 - Nouvel envoi
normalizedText:
First Name: Samuel
Last Name : Freeman
E-mail: s.a.freeman@gmail.com
Phone Number: 514-475-4863
Address: 427 Stuart
Deadline: printemps/été 2026
Message: Bonjour,

Je prévois des travaux de peinture extérieure sur ma maison semi-détachée à Outremont, incluant en hauteur (corniche en métal). Les travaux incluraient les fenêtres de bois avant et arrière, la corniche, et sofites, et une extension arrière en cèdre (deux étages).
J'aimerais une soumission pour ce projet.
Merci!
Samuel

subject: Feature: OstéoPeinture for Best House Painters in Montreal
normalizedSubject: Feature: OstéoPeinture for Best House Painters in Montreal
normalizedText:
Hi OstéoPeinture Team,

I’m Guinevere with *Best in Montreal*, and I’m currently finalizing our
2026 guide for the *Best House Painters in Montreal*.

I recently came across your portfolio and was impressed by your attention
to detail, your clean lines, and the glowing reputation you've built with
local homeowners. It’s clear that *OstéoPeinture* is making a meaningful
impact by helping Montrealers transform their living spaces with
professional care, and I’d love to discuss featuring your company.

You can see how we highlight top-tier local contractors here:
bestinmtl.com/best-house-painters-montreal

A featured spot for *OstéoPeinture* means:

-

*New Traffic:* We drive high-intent locals looking for a fresh coat or a
full renovation directly to your estimate request form.
-

*Google Visibility:* A high-quality backlink to boost your ranking for
the city's most competitive search terms.
-

*Montreal Credibility:* Rights to use the *"Best in Montreal"* badge on
your trucks and social media to build instant trust.

*Should I send over the details on how the placement works?*

Best Regards,
Guinevere Saint-Pierre
Partnership Manager | guinevere@bestinmtl.com
https://www.bestinmtl.com

subject: Notice of Content Ownership Review — Dalet
normalizedSubject: Notice of Content Ownership Review — Dalet
normalizedText:
Dalet

Intellectual property notice regarding account content

Dear osteopeinture@gmail.com,

We act as legal representatives for Dalet , the owner of certain intellectual property rights.

It has been brought to our attention that the account identified below appears to use intellectual property of Dalet without authorization or a valid licence.

Page Name:Ostéopeinture

Facebook ID:109054734301149

IP Rights Owner:Dalet

The use was identified during a routine review of publicly available content, and all relevant records have been preserved and are available for reference.

You are hereby requested to promptly cease any unauthorized use of the identified material and remove such content from all platforms, pages, or distribution channels under your control.

Resolution Timeline

You are expected to complete a review and implement corrective actions within seven (7) calendar days from 20/02/2026.

PDF View Document (PDF)

Please be advised that any continued unauthorized use of audio and visual content may result in civil and/or criminal liability under applicable Canadian copyright laws, including the Copyright Act (RSC, 1985, c. C-42), as amended and in force.

If the matter remains unresolved, further notices may be issued.

If the matter remains unresolved, we reserve the right to pursue further legal remedies without additional notice.

This notice is issued to provide an opportunity to resolve this matter before further escalation. Nothing contained herein shall be deemed a waiver of any rights or remedies, all of which are expressly reserved.

Respectfully,

Legal Affairs and Compliance Department

Whether exploring national parks or enjoying local festivals, Canada provides a unique blend of nature and modern living that attracts visitors and residents alike.

subject: [Action Advised] Review and manage your conversation retention settings for Gemini in Workspace
normalizedSubject: Review and manage your conversation retention settings for Gemini in Workspace
normalizedText:
Google Workspace logo

We're introducing conversation history to Gemini in Google Workspace.

Dear administrator,

We're introducing Conversation history to the Gemini side panel of Google Workspace apps. This feature will enable users to resume their conversations with Gemini across sessions. This history will only persist in a single app and conversations will remain private.

For example, a conversation in the side panel of Google Docs will not appear in the side panel of Google Sheets, and a conversation in the side panel of a shared file will not be visible to other users with access to that file. Here is the timeline of this rollout:

February 25, 2026: Admin controls for conversation history are available. See below for more details and recommended actions.
March 3, 2026: Conversation history will start rolling out to end users participating in the Gemini Alpha and Workspace Labs programs.
No sooner than March 17, 2026: Conversation history will begin rolling out to all other Workspace users. We'll notify you in advance of this rollout on the Workspace Updates Blog.

What this means for your organization

Once this feature rolls out to your users, they'll have access to their prior prompts and responses in whatever Workspace app they're working in. Here are some important things to note about how the feature works:

App-specific history: The system restricts history to the specific application to maintain user focus. For instance, an ongoing conversation in Google Docs will only be accessible when using Gemini within Google Docs.
Seamless continuity: Users can resume previous sessions immediately after closing the side panel or refreshing the page.
Conversation management: Users can rename, or delete your Gemini conversations within the side panel.
Conversation history: This will begin from the point at which the feature becomes available to an individual user; users will not be able to see conversations prior to the feature rolling out.

Note: This feature is part of Gemini in Workspace and subject to the same terms of service and data protection standards. Conversations remain private; users can only view their own individual history.

What you need to do

Action advised: As part of this launch, we've introduced two new Admin console settings to help you manage how your organization uses conversation data. Review the settings and make changes prior to the feature launching to users in your organization.

Manual deletion: Choose whether to allow users to manually delete their own conversation history.
Auto-deletion policies: Set a global retention policy for conversation data, or let users choose their own. While the default setting stores conversations indefinitely, you can change this in the Admin console to automatically delete inactive conversations after 3 months, 18 months, or 3 years.

Restrictions:

This feature is currently available on the web only.
Vault is not currently supported for this feature but planned for a future release.
In a future release, users will be able to configure their own auto-deletion policies, unless the admin has set one for them.

We're here to help

We believe that these updates will improve your Gemini in Workspace experience. For further details regarding this rollout, visit our Help Center or monitor Workspace Updates Blog for the latest updates.

Thanks for choosing Google Workspace.

– The Google Workspace Team

Was this information helpful?

A smiling face A neutral face A sad face

subject: Submit Your Plans for a Detailed Quote
normalizedSubject: Submit Your Plans for a Detailed Quote
normalizedText:
Hi there,

We provide professional construction *estimating and material takeoff* services
to General Contractors and Subcontractors.

We have expertise in the following trades:

*DemolitionSite WorkConcreteMasonryMetalsWood, Plastics & CompositesThermal
& Moisture ProtectionOpeningsFinishesFurnishingsElectricalPlumbingHVACand
more.*

If you’re interested in our services, simply send over your project plans
and scope of work. We will review the documents and provide you with a firm
quote outlining our service fee and turnaround time. Once approved, we will

subject: Application - Simon Baer
normalizedText:
Bonjour,

Je cherche un poste de peintre. J'ai deux ans d'expérience en peinture, un
comme gérant de trois équipes de peintres. Cette expérience m'a rendue
consciente
de la qualité, donc je peux vous garantir la qualité. Aussi, cela m'a
préparé à entretenir de bonnes relations avec les clients, à passer des
commandes de peinture et à comprendre comment aborder un projet de peinture.

Je suis étudiant à McGill, alors je serai seulement disponible de mai à
août, mais j'espère que je pourrai être utile à vous pour augmenter la
production pendant la saison de peinture extérieure. Je travaillerais fort
pendant ces mois.

Cordialement,
Simon Baer

548-994-6643.

subject: Sanivac pour vos conteneurs de chantier !
normalizedSubject: Sanivac pour vos conteneurs de chantier !
normalizedText:
https://conteneur.sanivac.ca/

LOCATION DE CONTENEURS
https://conteneur.sanivac.ca/

AVEZ-VOUS BESOIN D’UN CONTENEUR POUR VOS CHANTIERS?

CHOISISSEZ LES CONTENEURS SANIVAC!

Besoin de gérer des boues, matières contaminées ou liquides sur vos chantiers?
Sanivac vous propose un service clé en main de location de conteneurs étanches et de réservoirs Frac Tanks robustes, conçus pour le stockage sécuritaire de matières à risque.

De 20 à 105 verges³, nos conteneurs spécialisés sont parfaits pour :
* Les boues de forage ou d’excavation
* Les sols contaminés ou les matières hydrocarburées
* Les eaux usées ou résidus liquides industriels
* Les travaux environnementaux ou municipaux à haut volume

Tous les modèles étanches sont disponible avec un option de fond filtrant et nous offrons le service de vidange, transport et disposition des matières conforme aux normes environnementales.

Une solution fiable, conforme et disponible rapidement partout dans la grande région de Montréal.

TYPES DE CONTENEURS

CONTENEURS ÉTANCHES

** CONTENEUR 20 VERGES
------------------------------------------------------------

Toit ouvert avec toile

20 verges cube

15 000 litres | 3300 gallons

Poids maximal : 7 tonnes
https://conteneur.sanivac.ca/nos-conteneurs/

** CE CONTENEUR EST IDÉAL POUR :
------------------------------------------------------------

Idéal pour les boues de forage, petites quantités de sols contaminés ou résidus industriels en milieu restreint. Facile à manœuvrer, étanche et conforme. commerciaux.

** CONTENEUR 30 VERGES
------------------------------------------------------------

Toit ouvert avec toile

30 verges cube

23 000 litre | 5000 gallons

Poids maximal : 8,5 tonnes
https://conteneur.sanivac.ca/nos-conteneurs/

** CE CONTENEUR EST IDÉAL POUR :
------------------------------------------------------------

Utilisé pour des projets de taille moyenne, il est recommandé pour le confinement de matières semi-liquides, de résidus de chantier ou de sols humides nécessitant une gestion réglementée.

** CONTENEUR 40 VERGES
------------------------------------------------------------

Toit ouvert avec toile

40 verges cube

30 000 litres | 6500 gallons

Poids maximal : 10 tonnes
https://conteneur.sanivac.ca/nos-conteneurs/

** CE CONTENEUR EST IDÉAL POUR :
------------------------------------------------------------

Convient aux travaux industriels, aux projets municipaux et aux sites nécessitant une logistique efficace pour évacuer de grandes quantités de matières contaminées.

TYPES DE RÉSERVOIRS

RÉSERVOIRS FRAC TANK

** CONTENEUR FRAC TANK 40 VERGES
------------------------------------------------------------

Toit fermé

45 verges cube

35 000 litres | 7500 gallons
https://conteneur.sanivac.ca/nos-conteneurs/

** CE CONTENEUR EST IDÉAL POUR :
------------------------------------------------------------

Convient aux sites urbains, aux opérations environnementales ciblées ou aux travaux nécessitant un confinement sécurisé de boues ou liquides, avec un format pratique en roll-off.

** REMORQUE FRAC TANK 105 VERGES
------------------------------------------------------------

Toit fermé

105 verges cube

80 000 litres / 18 000 gallons
https://conteneur.sanivac.ca/nos-conteneurs/

** CE CONTENEUR EST IDÉAL POUR :
------------------------------------------------------------

Conçu pour les grands projets industriels et les chantiers municipaux à haut débit.
Pour les matières liquides ou contaminées, tout en assurant une gestion efficace et conforme grâce à son format remorque entièrement étanche.
DEMANDEZ UNE SOUMISSION (mailto:conteneur@sanivac.ca?subject=Demande%20de%20soumission&body=)
https://conteneur.sanivac.ca/

VOTRE RÉFÉRENCE POUR LA

LOCATION DE CONTENEURS

Vous avez aussi des déchets secs à gérer sur vos chantiers?
Sanivac propose également la location de conteneurs de construction pour tous vos besoins d’évacuation de matériaux comme :
* Bois, gypse, brique, béton
* Déchets de démolition ou de rénovation
* Déchets secs et volumineux

Formats disponibles : 10, 15, 20 et 40 verges³
📦 Livraison rapide, formats polyvalents, service clé en main.

Peu importe la nature de votre chantier — on a le bon conteneur pour chaque type de déchet.

*Greetings,*

*Planning a new project or bidding on one soon?*
Don’t go in blind. The right estimate can be the edge that wins you the job
*and* protects your profit.

*We provide laser-accurate construction cost estimates*—tailored for your
scope, your deadlines, and your bottom line. Whether you're renovating,
building new, or quoting a job—our numbers back you up.

*Here’s what you get:*

-

Real-world, contractor-level detail
-

Clear cost breakdowns for smart planning
-

Fast turnaround (we know time is money)

*Let’s help you quote smarter and win bigger.*
Just send us the plans and tell us about your next job. We’ll take it from
there.

No commitments. Just clarity.

Looking forward to helping you build with confidence. Thanks.

subject: job question
normalizedText:
Hi, I was looking for painting companies in the area, and yours stood out.

Quick question – if my team and I could help you secure a couple of additional painting jobs every month without you having to rely on referrals, would you be able to handle them?

I ask because we help painting contractors secure 7–14 ready-to-book painting jobs/month

Mind if I outline how we do it in a follow-up email?

Thank you,
HannahHannah F.
signatureBlock:
Thank you,
HannahHannah F.

subject: Pelletage manuel - Optimisez vos opérations hivernales!
normalizedSubject: Pelletage manuel - Optimisez vos opérations hivernales!
normalizedText:
Bonjour M./mme., Déneigement Québec espère que vous allez bien! Votre entrée déneigée sans effort.

Logo Déneigement Québec png (https://d2LHS004.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZW+113/d2LHS004/VX1n358LLGcTW1VGQlM94JgzGV1-ywc5C08VkMfRfk-3pyd0W7lCdLW6lZ3k-W7LGDr04D2ZRZW21RzWv2-dTSsW5Jffmc2_KwVJW5WJyjQ6yZkbXW3h4Fzc2sgg5DW4lxzL55p0hWLW8JfLyf2CJzd0W32mDj11TpTkcW94hFjk8DMSVNW5SyK7y3l0q_TW4fX5sx1QFN31W8Kzrv283bs0wW5xY8CH3WflfTW1wWfpD7XSW85W2PZ3tD5q9jb5MSms4C-rYB_W5-hBJt3GkW6nW33Qrmw2RWfg5W6CDNFt10vpnxVRcZFP6v0zBLW5QpDnv2W6Qr6W3ZmRPM4ysK7FW39gBLp3Qr5TbN6BV4_tZjp9nf4FQrnH04 )

Préparez-vous avant l'hiver!

L'hiver approche rapidement. Ne restez pas sans service de déneigement manuel.

Assurez la continuité de vos opérations cet hiver grâce à un service de déneigement manuel rapide et fiable, pour besoins commerciaux ou résidentiels.

Déneigement Québec dessert l’ensemble de la grande région de Montréal pour le pelletage manuel des accès commerciaux, zones piétonnières, quais de chargement et entrées critiques.

Notre équipe est disponible sur demande et s’engage à répondre à votre demande de devis en moins de 24 heures.

*Si vous avez déjà une demande en cours, merci de ne pas tenir compte de ce courriel*

Je veux une soumission!
(https://d2LHS004.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/ZW+113/d2LHS004/VX1n358LLGcTW1VGQlM94JgzGV1-ywc5C08VkMfRflg3pyd0W7Y8-PT6lZ3mNV-BMxW7YQCM2W1yZxbC1LgyGJW8Tv89-2jjnZ3V9swCx4BhC0vW1SqWqm8N268_W5dlPnY8C4F2XW1LL2vT4fXCnyW8Z_Vzw33LlbgW4zmp7P27-nGWW5HP4zy6l3B0fW8vVtcb330M_nW49Rd2K5vgMqSVcYBKR6B8K6rW7ZSXPW4STQ-NW23gyLp1LDLQ9W6v36nQ4QwkHVW2YKHFq4v7SGPW3GDj4m2ftxLLVzjdbV4N-RwPW7j9BTd5VZgFPW2W2KHc5_yd6pW6QDjls5MDyN_W32pYmz44BSNMM7kXL1JKh9cW8s55vr6Yc94GW50Z6KB831kZdf13xrNT04 )

Pelletage manuel

Offert aux résidents/commerces de la grande région de Montréal, nos techniciens professionnels s’assurent de fournir un service de déneigement à la pelle adapté à vos besoins spécifiques. Grâce à nos contrats de déneigement, vous n’aurez plus à vous inquiéter de la neige avant de partir au travail. Nous offrons également un service d’épandage d’abrasifs pour rendre vos chemins sûrs. Si vous cherchez un déneigeur piétonnier compétent, ne cherchez plus! Nous sommes l’entreprise de déneigement qu’il vous faut.

Déneigement Québec, 1041 boulvard du lac, Lac-Beauport, Quebec G3B 0X4, Canada, 581-703-0863

subject: 💡 A Website Redesign Can Transform Your Business—Here’s How
normalizedSubject: 💡 A Website Redesign Can Transform Your Business—Here’s How
normalizedText:
Hello ,

Your website may be online 24/7, but here's the real question—is it actively bringing in clients, or just sitting there while potential customers go elsewhere?

Here's what we often find holding businesses back:
✅ Visitors land on the site but don't find what they need fast enough
✅ No clear call-to-action, so they bounce and call competitors
✅ Outdated design that instantly lowers trust
✅ Frustrating mobile experience for 50%+ of visitors
✅ Weak SEO, so fewer people find you in the first place

A great website isn't just about looking nice—it should:
👉 Convert visitors into leads & paying clients
👉 Build trust with testimonials, awards & case studies
👉 Deliver a smooth, mobile-first browsing experience
👉 Rank higher on Google to drive consistent organic traffic

I'd love to show you how we help businesses turn underperforming sites into 24/7 growth assets. Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call this week on Zoom, WhatsApp, or Google Meet?

Warm Regards,
Vincent Lindsey .

PS Every day with an underperforming site means lost opportunities. Let's change that—what time works best for you this week?
signatureBlock:
Warm Regards,
Vincent Lindsey .

PS Every day with an underperforming site means lost opportunities. Let's change that—what time works best for you this week?

subject: Gestion Recevable
normalizedText:
En tant que bureau de crédit pour le secteur de la construction, je sais à quel point il est essentiel de maintenir une trésorerie
saine.

L'une des plus grandes menaces pour cette trésorerie ? Les retards de paiement de vos clients.

C'est pourquoi je voulais vous contacter pour souligner l'importance de rester attentif à vos créances. C'est un domaine facile à
négliger, mais le faire peut avoir de graves conséquences pour la santé financière de votre entreprise.

Voici pourquoi vous devez faire de la gestion des créances une priorité absolue :

-Les factures impayées bloquent votre fond de roulement. Lorsque les clients ne paient pas à temps, cet argent est dans les limbes
au lieu d'être disponible pour couvrir vos propres dépenses, pour investir dans de nouveaux projets ou pour développer votre
entreprise.

-Les retards de paiement perturbent votre trésorerie. Des rentrées d'argent irrégulières ou retardées rendent difficile la
prévision de vos revenus entrants et la planification en conséquence. Cela peut entraîner des problèmes de trésorerie qui vous
obligent à retarder les paiements de vos propres fournisseurs et sous-traitants.

-Poursuivre les retardataires et accaparants. Envoyer des relances par e-mail, passer des coups de fil et éventuellement faire
intervenir des agences de recouvrement prend du temps et des ressources précieuses qui pourraient être consacrés à vos activités
principales.

-Les factures impayées peuvent nuire aux relations avec les clients. Devoir sans cesse les harceler pour obtenir le paiement peut
tendre ces importantes relations d'affaires et rendre plus difficile l'obtention de nouveaux contrats ou de recommandations à
l'avenir.

La bonne nouvelle, c'est qu'il existe des mesures à prendre pour maîtriser vos créances et éviter ces écueils. Voici quelques
conseils :

• Définissez des conditions de paiement claires dès le départ et incluez des pénalités de retard pour les factures échues.

• Mettez en place un système de facturation et de rappel de paiement automatisé.

• Examinez régulièrement vos comptes clients et suivez les montants en souffrance.

• Envisagez d'offrir des remises pour paiement anticipé ou d'autres incitations pour encourager les paiements ponctuels.

• Faites appel à un service de gestion des créances professionnel pour s'occuper du recouvrement en votre nom.

Si vous voulez plus d'informations à ce sujet, appelez-moi ou text au 438-799-3412 pour prendre rendez-vous.

Marc
438-799-3412

legal@acces-credit.ca

Club Construction Conseils

P.S. Je vous enverrai occasionnellement des courriels contenant des conseils, des vidéos et des ressources gratuites
supplémentaires... Mais si vous n'êtes pas intéressé, n'hésitez pas à cliquer sur le bouton ci-dessous pour vous désabonner à tout
moment.

subject: Immediate Action Required – Compliance Issues Detected on Your Website
normalizedSubject: Immediate Action Required – Compliance Issues Detected on Your Website
normalizedText:
Hello Site Owner,

Our latest compliance review has identified *critical issues on your
website* that require *immediate resolution* to avoid disruption of
services:

*1. Website Design & Mobile Responsiveness*

-

Layouts are not fully mobile-optimized.
-

This reduces visitor trust, lowers engagement, and fails to meet
platform standards.

*2. eCommerce Configuration*

-

Missing product details, payment processing errors, and unconfigured
shipping/tax rules.
-

These disrupt transactions, affect customer experience, and raise
compliance concerns.

*3. Booking & Appointment System*

-

Setup remains incomplete and lacks automation.
-

This creates scheduling difficulties and service delivery risks.

⚠ *Consequences if Unresolved*

-

Decline in search visibility and customer engagement
-

Failed or interrupted transactions
-

Restricted platform features and compliance penalties
-

Possible account suspension

✅ *Required Next Step*
Please confirm your action plan within *12 hours* and provide a completion
summary once corrective steps are taken.

If you require support, reply with *CONNECT* to be assigned a Certified
Specialist who will assist in restoring compliance and optimizing your
website.

This matter is time-sensitive. Taking immediate action will protect your
account and prevent further disruption.

Best regards,
*Wix Compliance Team*

subject: Availability and estimate for interior painting of NDG condo?
normalizedSubject: Availability and estimate for interior painting of NDG condo?
normalizedText:
Hello,

Prior to moving into a new condo we'd like painting of an open
living/dining/den space, small area in kitchen, and a bedroom.

In the bedroom one wall will need to have existing wallpaper removed first
and will likely need more than one coat of paint as we'd like to go from
the current dark green colour to a lighter colour.

In the living/dining/den space and kitchen we would stay with a similar
light colour so may need fewer coats. We would leave one wall unpainted
(currently has wallpaper).

I can provide photos and/or can show you the condo.

Please let me know if you have availability in the next few weeks and your
process to provide an estimate?

Thanks,
Lisa
signatureBlock:
Thanks,
Lisa

subject: Vos clients vous appelleraient-ils s'ils avaient des problèmes de trésorerie ?
normalizedSubject: Vos clients vous appelleraient-ils s'ils avaient des problèmes de trésorerie ?
normalizedText:
Si votre client a des problèmes de trésorerie, c'est qu'il a beaucoup de choses en tête.

Vous appeler n'est probablement pas leur priorité. De plus, cela peut être embarrassant pour lui.

En général, on constate qu'ils commencent à vous ignorer. Puis, une facture à 30 jours se transforme en facture à 60, 90,
etc...... alors vous avez un problème.

Nos clients sont en mesure de surveiller tous leurs clients commerciaux à leur insu. Ils surveillent l'avenir semaine après
semaine. Si leur client commence à être poursuivi dans les trois mois par le gouvernement ou par l'un de vos concurrents, vous
recevez un courrier électronique vous informant de la situation.

Imaginez que vous receviez 3 ou 4 poursuites contre votre client pour des factures impayées....vous pouvez être proactif et vous
protéger. Je vois cela tout le temps.

Si vous voulez plus d'informations à ce sujet, appelez-moi au 438-799-3412 pour prendre rendez-vous.

Marc
438-799-3412

legal@acces-credit.ca

Club Construction Conseils

P.S. Je vous enverrai occasionnellement des courriels contenant des conseils, des vidéos et des ressources gratuites
supplémentaires... Mais si vous n'êtes pas intéressé, n'hésitez pas à cliquer sur le bouton ci-dessous pour vous désabonner à tout
moment.

subject: markdrolet@outlook.com
normalizedText:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/acc094c72d73/markdroletoutlookcom-684434?e=d64f53a22e)

Présentation de Céramique AF – L’excellence en revêtement et finition haut de gamme

Bonjour,

Je me permets de vous contacter afin de vous présenter Céramique AF, une entreprise reconnue comme l’un des leaders dans le domaine de la céramique et du revêtement haut de gamme. Grâce à une équipe d’experts passionnés et à des équipements de pointe, nous offrons à nos partenaires des solutions durables, esthétiques et adaptées aux plus hauts standards de qualité.

Forte d’une vaste expérience et d’une clientèle fidèle et satisfaite, Céramique AF s’est imposée comme une référence dans la réalisation de projets commerciaux, résidentiels et institutionnels. Notre succès repose sur un savoir-faire précis, un respect rigoureux des délais et une attention constante aux détails — autant de valeurs qui nous permettent de bâtir des relations de confiance avec entrepreneurs généraux, architectes et promoteurs à travers la région.

Dans le cadre de notre croissance continue, nous cherchons à établir de nouveaux partenariats solides avec des professionnels qui partagent notre vision de l’excellence et du travail bien fait.

Nous serions ravis d’en apprendre davantage sur vos projets à venir et d’échanger sur la façon dont Céramique AF peut contribuer à leur réussite.

N’hésitez pas à me contacter afin de planifier un appel ou une rencontre.

Cordialement,

Francois Boulard

Owner-CEO

subject: Des recevables problématiques? Frais d'avocat ?
normalizedText:
Avez-vous une clause de dommage sur votre soumission et votre facture ?

L'un des éléments les plus importants de ces conditions est la clause de dommage. Lorsqu'elle est correctement rédigée, nos
clients peuvent être en mesure d'augmenter leur dette de 25 % lorsqu'ils ont besoin d'une agence de recouvrement ou d'un avocat
pour recouvrer leurs créances impayées. Ce montant couvre généralement les honoraires de l'avocat.

Voici un exemple : Si vous avez une créance impayée de 20 000 $ et qu'une clause de dommage a été rédigée au bon endroit, vous
pouvez augmenter votre dette à 25 000 $ pour couvrir les frais juridiques.

Nous fournissons à nos clients un modèle de contrat que notre avocat a mis à jour.

Si vous voulez plus d'informations à ce sujet, appelez-moi au 438-799-3412 pour prendre rendez-vous.

Marc
438-799-3412

legal@acces-credit.ca

Club Construction Conseils

subject: Dominate the market with accurate estimations
normalizedSubject: Dominate the market with accurate estimations
normalizedText:
Greetings!

We provide *estimate and takeoff services *to the GC and subcontractors. We
have expertise in following trades:-

*Demolition*

*Site works*

*Concrete*

*Masonry*

*Metals*

*Wood, Plastic & Composites*

*Thermal and Moisture Protection*

*Openings*

*Finishes*

*Furnishes*

*Electrical*

*Plumbing*

*HVAC*

If you are interested in getting our services then just send over the plans
so that we can provide you with a firm quote on which our service charges
and turnaround time will be mentioned and if you agree on that quote then
we will proceed with your estimate.

Kind Regards,

Cruz Carter
signatureBlock:
Kind Regards,

Cruz Carter

subject: Residential, Commercial, and Industrial Projects
normalizedText:
May I help you?

If you have any projects coming up, I can help with the estimates. Please
send me the plans or details when you can.

After reviewing, I’ll send you a quote with price and time needed.

Feel free to ask if you have any questions.

Regards,
Cristian saldivar

subject: Offre de service
normalizedText: Email from Gestion Union   ﻿Gestion Union On n'a pas inventé la roue, on l'a optimisée! ﻿Entrepreneurs spécialisés ? Nous avons vos généraux! Entrepreneurs généraux ? Nous avons vos spécialisés! Bonjour, L'envoi de courriels est une pratique bien établie. Toutefois, l'enjeu demeure : atteindre les bons contacts, en nombre suffisant, pour générer un réel impact. C'est précisément ce que nous offrons aux entreprises de la construction du Québec : une base de données complète et ciblée regroupant entrepreneurs généraux, développeurs, constructeurs, rénovateurs, entrepreneurs spécialisés et autres acteurs clés du secteur. Nos résultats parlent d'eux-mêmes Plus de 40 000 entrepreneurs répertoriés et catégorisés par type, lieu, spécialité, etc. Taux d'ouverture dépassant régulièrement 50 % (bien au-delà de la moyenne du secteur) La solution idéale pour tous vos besoins de réseautage dans l'industrie de la construction 🎯À qui s'adressent nos services ? Entrepreneurs spécialisés : Ciblez avec précision le type de clients désirés Contrôlez vos coûts de publicité sans surprise Gérez votre courbe de croissance Augmentez significativement votre volume de ventes Préparez efficacement la saison suivante Entrepreneurs généraux : ﻿ Complétez rapidement vos listes de sous-traitants spécialisés Accédez à un réseau qualifié et diversifié Gagnez du temps dans vos recherches de partenaires Combien ça coûte ? ﻿Détails et tarifs : veuillez consulter le PDF en cliquant sur le bouton ci-dessous. Intéressé(e) à en savoir plus ? Contactez-nous ! Cordialement, Liste de prix décembre Nous joindre par courriel Gestion Union Steve Préfontaine (514) 506-4366 Gestion Union | 3877 rue Auclair | Carignan, QC J3L 4A7 CA Annonce de partenariat — Gestion Union x La Crème des Talents ﻿Besoin d'un vendeur, closer, installateur ou tout autre employé clé ? L'agence La Crème des Talents accompagne les entreprises de construction dans le recrutement de profils performants : vendeurs, closers, estimateurs, installateurs, chargés de projets et autres rôles essentiels à vos opérations. Nous trouvons, validons et présentons les meilleurs talents adaptés à vos besoins: Stratégiques ou opérationnels. Embauchez en toute confiance : vous bénéficiez d'un essai de 30 jours. Vous ne payez que si le talent est le bon. Aucun frais ni engagement pour rencontrer nos candidats. Nous joindre par courriel Pour la période du 23 novembre au 22 décembre, et étant en déplacement à l’international, merci d’utiliser le numéro suivant pour me joindre : +1 (514) 700-8422. _____________________________ Emilie Boucher | Conseillère en acquisition de talent Téléphone 819 208 3618 ou 514 700 8422 du 23 nov au 22 déc Courriel emilieboucher.office@gmail.com La Crème des Talents, Firme spécialisée en recrutement 🌐 lacremedestalents.com Ce email a été envoyé à Ostéopeinture S.E.N.C. We hope you find value in this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and we want to take a moment to
ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from
future emails.

Why You’re Receiving This Email

You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve
previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your
information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us.

If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free
from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages.

Your Privacy is Important

We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold,
or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us
directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have.

You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs
clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction.

How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences

We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there are no hard feelings. You
can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below.

By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as
receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward,
and any changes will take effect promptly.

We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if
they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways.

Accessibility and Communication

If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email,
you can reach out directly by replying to this email. We aim to respond within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns
effectively.

Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any
feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share.

A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails

We aim to create a nonintrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages and
work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide
updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know.

Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can improve and refine
our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee that every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to review
and consider your input carefully.

Legal Information

We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and
maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every
email you receive meets these requirements.

If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and
accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed.

A Final Note

Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way
you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel,
we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you.

We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and
we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you.

This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication
preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

subject: Re: Estimates for Developers Who Build with Confidence
normalizedSubject: Estimates for Developers Who Build with Confidence
normalizedText:
Hi there,

I’m following up on my earlier message about the organized estimates we
prepare. I know things get busy, so I wanted to check in.

If you’d like, I can *send a sample estimate* so you can see the format and
accuracy of our work. It may help make your next bid easier to review.

If you have any current project, feel free to share it. I’ll review it and
send back a clear, detailed quote.

If this isn’t something you need, reply *“Stop” *and I won’t reach out
again. Thank you.

On Wed, Nov 5, 2025 at 12:20 PM Eoin Morgan <eoin.accuratetakesoff@gmail.com>
wrote:
signatureBlock:
again. Thank you.

subject: Re: cost estimation and plans
normalizedText:
*Happy New Year,*

*Excited to Start New Projects in the New Year*

I hope you had a wonderful holiday and that the start of the New Year is
treating you well!

As we move into 2026, we are looking forward to continuing our partnership
and exploring new opportunities together. If there are any new projects or
upcoming initiatives where we can be of assistance, we’d love to discuss
how we can contribute to their success.

Please feel free to share any details or ideas you might have, and let’s
connect soon to outline next steps.

Wishing you a successful and prosperous year ahead!

subject: Re: Project Cost Estimation – GC or Individual Trade Focus
normalizedSubject: Project Cost Estimation – GC or Individual Trade Focus
normalizedText:
Greetings,

I hope you’re having a great week. I wanted to follow up to see if you
might have any upcoming projects where additional estimating support could
be helpful.

Our team specializes in accurate material takeoffs, quantity takeoffs, and
labor cost estimates, and we aim to make the process as smooth and
efficient as possible. I’d be happy to review plans, provide a quote, or
share a sample so you can evaluate our work.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you’d like more information at any
time.

Thank you.

subject: 14 high-quality painting leads in one month
normalizedSubject: 14 high-quality painting leads in one month
normalizedText:
Hi Loric St-Onge (Ostéo Peinture)

I came across your Google reviews and they stood out, so I wanted to reach
out.

I recently helped a painting contractor generate *14 high-quality leads in
one month* using a simple review-driven ad system.

I put together a short behind-the-scenes breakdown showing how it worked
and how painters with strong reviews can use the same approach.

Would you be open to a *20-minute call* to see if this could make sense for
your business?

Juan-Carlos

Commercial Painting Playbook: How to Build an Eight-Figure Empire

Matt Kuyper built a $10 million painting company in seven years.

He started as a side hustle.

He learned residential painting from YouTube videos.

And he used a relationship-first approach that most contractors have never even considered.

The commercial opportunity is real.

The global painting services market hit $63 billion in 2023.

It’ll reach $93 billion by 2031.

In the broader construction industry, 92% of firms report difficulty hiring qualified workers.

That’s a massive gap between opportunity and execution.

This playbook breaks down exactly how Kuyper did it.

There is no fluff, just the framework that took Harpeth Painting from zero to eight figures in Nashville, Tennessee.

We hope you find value in this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and we want to take a moment to
ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from
future emails.

Why You’re Receiving This Email

You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve
previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your
information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us.

If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free
from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages.

Your Privacy is Important

We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold,
or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us
directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have.

You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs
clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction.

How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences

We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there are no hard feelings. You
can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below.

By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as
receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward,
and any changes will take effect promptly.

We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if
they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways.

Accessibility and Communication

If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email,
you can reach out directly by replying to this email. We aim to respond within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns
effectively.

Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any
feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share.

A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails

We aim to create a nonintrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages and
work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide
updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know.

Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can improve and refine
our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee that every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to review
and consider your input carefully.

Legal Information

We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and
maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every
email you receive meets these requirements.

If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and
accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed.

A Final Note

Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way
you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel,
we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you.

We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and
we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you.

This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication
preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

6 Lead Channels Exposed: What 250+ Painting Contractors Taught Us About Where to Spend (and Where to Stop Wasting Money)

We broke down data from over 250 painting and coating contractors.

6 marketing channels. Side by side. No fluff.

Here's what surprised us:

🎯 Meta Ads deliver the highest lead volume at the lowest cost, but contractors who treat those leads like Google leads book zero
jobs.

🎯 Google PPC can run $150–$300+ per lead in competitive markets. That's before you even pick up the phone.

🎯 Search EVERYWHERE Optimization takes 6–12 months, but it's the only channel that becomes an asset you own.

🎯 Email Marketing has the lowest cost per conversion. Yet most painters collect emails and never use them.

The "best" channel doesn't exist... but the right combination for YOUR business does.

We broke it all down.

The good, the bad, and the stuff most agencies leave out of their sales pitch 👇

We hope you find value in this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and we want to take a moment to
ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from
future emails.

Why You’re Receiving This Email

You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve
previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your
information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us.

If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free
from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages.

Your Privacy is Important

We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold,
or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us
directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have.

You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs
clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction.

How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences

We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there are no hard feelings. You
can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below.

By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as
receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward,
and any changes will take effect promptly.

We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if
they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways.

Accessibility and Communication

If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email,
you can reach out directly by replying to this email. We aim to respond within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns
effectively.

Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any
feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share.

A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails

We aim to create a nonintrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages and
work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide
updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know.

Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can improve and refine
our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee that every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to review
and consider your input carefully.

Legal Information

We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and
maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every
email you receive meets these requirements.

If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and
accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed.

A Final Note

Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way
you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel,
we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you.

We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and
we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you.

This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication
preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

subject: A Fresh Coat of Excellence: Feature OstéoPeinture in Montreal's Best Painters Guide
normalizedSubject: A Fresh Coat of Excellence: Feature OstéoPeinture in Montreal's Best Painters Guide
normalizedText:
Hi OstéoPeinture Team,

My name is Pierette Allen from *Best in Montreal <http://bestinmtl.com/>*, a
trusted local guide used by thousands of homeowners and businesses to find
the city's most reliable and skilled home renovation professionals.

We are currently updating our popular 2026 guide to the Best Painters in
Montreal, and your company came up as a strong candidate for inclusion. We
were particularly impressed by what makes you a standout choice for
Montrealers looking to refresh and protect their spaces.

As we highlight in our current guide, the top painting professionals in the
city are defined by their extensive experience, commitment to high-quality
workmanship and materials, proper licensing and insurance, and excellent
customer communication throughout the project. Your service fits this
profile perfectly.

*Being featured on our list helps in a few key ways:*

-

Targeted Visibility: Reach Montreal homeowners and commercial property
managers actively searching for trusted experts for interior or exterior
painting projects.
-

Built-in Trust: Join a curated, vetted list of the city's most reputable
and highly-recommended painting contractors, trusted by our readers to
deliver a flawless, durable finish.
-

Direct Inquiries: Drive motivated clients seeking free estimates and
professional consultations straight to your booking line or website.

You can see the current guide we're updating here:
*bestinmtl.com/best-painters-montreal*
<https://bestinmtl.com/best-painters-montreal>

Would you be open to being included in this year's rankings? If so, just
hit reply and I'll be happy to send over the simple next steps.
*Best Regards,*

Pierette Allen
Partnership Manager | Best in Montreal
*pierette@bestinmtl.com <pierette@bestinmtl.com>*
signatureBlock:
Pierette Allen

Commercial Painting for Residential Contractors: A 2026 Guide

Have you thought about bidding on commercial projects before?

But then you ran the numbers...

👉 Bonding requirements

👉 Equipment you don’t own

👉 Relationships that took someone else a decade to build

So are you stuck with residential?

Not at all.

This logic made sense five years ago, but today, you must diversify to survive.

Private equity has dumped over $31 billion into home services since 2014 🤯

Your residential competitors now include well-funded platforms with marketing budgets you cannot match.

But commercial painting runs on a different set of rules.

Rules that reward reliability over ad spend. Relationships over lead volume.

Learn how to get off the hamster wheel as a residential contractor by landing more commercial work in 2026...

We hope you find value in this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and we want to take a moment to
ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from
future emails.

Why You’re Receiving This Email

You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve
previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your
information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us.

If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free
from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages.

Your Privacy is Important

We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold,
or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us
directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have.

You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs
clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction.

How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences

We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there are no hard feelings. You
can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below.

By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as
receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward,
and any changes will take effect promptly.

We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if
they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways.

Accessibility and Communication

If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email,
you can reach out directly by replying to this email. We aim to respond within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns
effectively.

Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any
feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share.

A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails

We aim to create a nonintrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages and
work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide
updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know.

Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can improve and refine
our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee that every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to review
and consider your input carefully.

Legal Information

We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and
maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every
email you receive meets these requirements.

If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and
accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed.

A Final Note

Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way
you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel,
we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you.

We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and
we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you.

This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication
preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

subject: LTM Peinture
normalizedText:
** Rafraîchissez votre espace en 2026 !
------------------------------------------------------------

Salut!

Alors que nous planifions nos projets pour 2026, LTM Peinture prévoit d’ajouter 1 ou 2 nouveaux projets à son calendrier dans la région de Montréal. Votre espace pourrait être l’un d’eux !

En tant qu’entreprise locale, nous comprenons l’importance de l’image, de la durabilité et du respect des échéances pour votre organisation.

Que ce soit pour :
* Peinture intérieure de bureaux
* Rafraîchissement extérieur
* Entrepôts et bâtiments industriels
* Commerces
* Immeubles multi-locatifs

Notre objectif est clair : vous offrir un résultat impeccable, livré à temps et sans tracas.

Si vous envisagez des travaux cette année, nous serions ravis de vous proposer une soumission gratuite sur place et d’échanger avec vous au sujet de vos besoins.

Au plaisir de collaborer avec vous,

Louis McIntosh

LTM Peinture

+1(514) 291 1484

https://ltmpeinture.com (https://ltmpeinture.com/) /

____________________________________________________________________________

** Refresh your space in 2026 !
------------------------------------------------------------

Hey!

As we plan our projects for 2026, LTM Painting is looking to add 1 or 2 new projects to our schedule in the Montreal area—your space could be one of them!

As a local company, we understand how important image, durability, and meeting deadlines are for your organization.

Whether it’s for:
* Interior office painting
* Exterior refresh
* Warehouses and industrial buildings
* Retail spaces
* Multi-unit residential buildings

Our goal is simple: to deliver flawless results, on time, and hassle-free.

If you’re considering any updates this year, we’d be happy to provide a free on-site estimate and discuss your needs.

We look forward to the opportunity to work with you,

Louis McIntosh

LTM Peinture

+1(514) 291 1484

https://ltmpeinture.com (https://ltmpeinture.com/) /

https://facebook.com/
https://instagram.com/

Copyright (C) 2026 LTM Peinture. Tous droits réservés.
Nous vous envoyons cet e-mail, car vous vous êtes abonné via notre site Web.
Notre adresse postale est la suivante :
LTM Peinture
8523 Av Andre-Grasset
Montreal, QC H2M 2M5
Canada
